title: Make Codex planning runtime recovery observable and retry-safe
description: The API-owned planning job correctly preserves no partial proposal, but live exact BDO and outsourcing planning runs end in codex_response_stream_disconnected after a provider error. The marketer needs a truthful recovery path while engineering distinguishes provider/runtime failure from API input or schema failure.
design: Keep the single Codex app-server seam and explicit operator retry. Preserve typed runtime trace, run ID, event/item evidence and no fallback. Add only API/dashboard behavior that materially reduces ambiguity or unsafe retries; do not auto-retry model turns or add a second model path.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh controlled runtime failure is visible as a typed blocker with exact run trace and safe retry guidance; GET remains model-free; failed jobs never create proposals or duplicate turns; dashboard makes retry state and last failure understandable without exposing raw provider payloads; focused falsifier covers the public route and runtime failure classification; semantic commit, Beads update and fresh second-opinion checker.
close_reason: Codex runtime recovery, observability and retry-safe planning path are implemented and live-verified; remaining content approval gates are separate.

title: First viewport nie może czekać na ciężki snapshot
description: Po wyborze inventory i Run workflow dashboard pokazuje kolejkę, ale selected snapshot mierzy około 10.78s na ciepłym managed stacku, a cold start był odczuwany jako wielominutowy spinner. Zmierz i skróć ścieżkę krytyczną przez istniejące API; ciężkie read-only panele nie mogą blokować decision view.
design: Rozdziel minimalny selected decision read od secondary authoring/enrichment/activation reads, użyj poprawnej krótkiej cache/freshness i równoległości bez model call ani vendor write. Zachowaj pełne dane dla kroków, per-panel loading/error i exact lineage.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright wybiera dowolny inventory item i widzi tytuł, decyzję, metryki/źródła oraz blocker w kilka sekund; snapshot i secondary endpoint timings są zapisane; GET nie uruchamia Codexa; brak regresji w dashboard/API tests.
notes:
Final managed re-proof after metric fix/restart: selected queue HTTP 200 cold 4.304s (catalog cold), repeat 0.942s; snapshot HTTP 200 1.91s then 1.513s. Earlier warm queue 0.17s and cold snapshot 3.065s remain comparable; no correctness regression, metric_store full suite 15 green.
2026-07-18: selected queue no longer performs synchronous full WordPress material read; explicit inventory selection returns catalog-backed decision with material-pending state, while snapshot remains exact read-only material seam. API lifespan prewarms inventory catalog in background. Managed restart proof: queue 1.077s then 0.503s/0.176s/0.222s/0.229s; no model/vendor write. Focused queue tests 5 passed, dashboard ContentWorkflowSurface 30 passed. Remaining: cold snapshot/browser proof and final second-opinion review.
2026-07-18 final proof: Playwright selected-inventory meat-before-slow-queue + inventory-bound workflow 2/2 passed; queue first read 1.077s after restart, then 0.503/0.176/0.222/0.229s. Added honest material-pending label so missing full material cannot appear as plan-ready. Commits 301125a0, 42609ca9, 31ab0abd, 3a3aca87 pushed to origin/main. Remaining snapshot/full pipeline work is separate.

Dashboard renders queue-selected loading panel before snapshot, so first useful page/metrics view is not blocked by the heavy snapshot. No model call on selection.

title: Prevent security redaction from corrupting persisted content prose
description: Content revision persistence applies the generic redact_mapping matcher to the complete document. Any ordinary 32+ character alphanumeric run can be replaced with [REDACTED], after which the corrupted value becomes the canonical stored revision and digest.
design: Separate content-field validation from secret-bearing metadata redaction. Preserve legitimate title/lead/body/FAQ/CTA prose and URLs after typed validation while still removing known credential/token values from traces and metadata. Do not weaken the global secret boundary without a focused security decision.
acceptance_criteria: A legitimate long alphanumeric prose token survives revision save/readback/digest; representative credential/token values in allowed secret-bearing fields remain redacted; corruption cannot change idempotency or review binding; v1/v2 round-trip and security falsifiers pass.
notes: 2026-07-18 verification: redaction contract (24 tests) + content revision/revision-v2 suites (12 tests) green. Long alphanumeric prose survives readback/digest; credential-bearing metadata and URLs remain redacted; idempotent retry and exact digest/review binding remain covered. No vendor write. Closed as production fix; remaining full pipeline blockers are separate.

comments.author: korneliuszburian

title: Bind WordPress execution readback to the exact revision handoff
description: The activation packet asks the store for latest_wordpress_draft_execution(work_item_id). A later or historical execution for the same item can therefore be displayed beside a different current revision/handoff binding.
design: Persist and query execution readback by exact revision/handoff/ActionObject binding while keeping historical rows immutable. The current activation packet exposes only a result matching its exact binding; an older result remains audit history and is visibly stale, never current.
acceptance_criteria: Two executions for one work item but different revision/handoff bindings round-trip independently; the activation packet returns only the exact current match or a typed no-current-execution state; stale results cannot unlock measurement or WordPress readiness; v1 history remains readable; no vendor write is run in proof.
close_reason: Exact revision/handoff-bound WordPress execution history and readback implemented; legacy v1 remains readable; activation and measurement no longer reuse stale bound executions. Proof: publication-bound measurement 3 passed, WordPress execution API 17 passed, shared schemas 42 passed, dashboard TypeScript passed, inventory-bound browser proof passed.

title: Preserve immutable measurement-window history and idempotency
description: POST /measurement-window currently saves with an UPSERT keyed by work_item_id. Repeating the command after a changed publication/window can overwrite the baseline/observation record that an outcome and learning proposal are expected to explain.
design: Make measurement windows immutable and versioned or idempotent by exact binding/digest. Outcomes and learning proposals bind one window ID; later windows append instead of replacing history. Keep v1 readback and use temporary storage for proof until a maintenance window authorizes real-state activation.
acceptance_criteria: Identical exact input returns the same stored window without duplication; changed publication, period or binding creates a new immutable window; old windows/outcomes remain readable; an outcome/learning proposal cannot silently rebind to a newer window; focused round-trip and stale-binding proof pass.
close_reason: Measurement windows, outcomes and learning proposals now append immutable history with exact digests, idempotent duplicates, explicit historical readback and v1 fallback. Focused proof: publication-bound measurement/history 5 passed plus measurement-window 3 passed; git diff check clean.

title: Feed real connector facts into publication-bound content measurement
description: Publication-bound measurement accepts only exact page aggregates with baseline/observation period strings. Current GSC facts are query+page with connector_refresh and GA4 facts include source/campaign dimensions with a rolling window, so production-format facts cannot populate allowed or observed metrics.
design: Add one server-owned exact-URL, exact-period aggregate seam for the existing measurement loop. Reuse cross-source landing identity and connector-specific window/quality semantics; do not inject synthetic facts, invent targets, broaden matching, or create a second learning loop.
acceptance_criteria: Production-format GSC and eligible GA4 facts for the exact canonical URL and measurement periods populate allowed/observed metrics; query/detail rows, wrong periods, ambiguous URLs and insufficient quality stay excluded with typed reasons; the existing publication and exact-window gates remain; focused proof starts from real connector-shaped facts and no vendor write occurs.
notes:

Vendor contract proof plus metric-store suite 16 passed. GA4 already emits exact date period. Existing historical DuckDB rows without dates remain blocked; next read/refresh proof should use a fresh GSC run.

close_reason: Exact URL/period GSC+GA4 aggregate seam and publication-bound measurement quality gates are implemented and verified; wrong-period, ambiguous and insufficient-quality facts remain excluded with lineage. Real BDO evidence proof recorded; no vendor write or outcome claim.

title: Expose mobile Command Center overflow without expanding the first viewport
description: CommandCenter slices blockers and forbidden claims to two before MobileDailyTriage receives them. The compact mobile card therefore cannot tell Wilku that additional safety information exists.
design: Keep at most two blocker details and two forbidden claims visible in the mobile triage, but pass complete collections into the component and render explicit +N overflow counts with a safe route to the full desktop/queue context. Do not dump the full list into the first viewport.
acceptance_criteria: With more than two blockers or forbidden claims, mobile shows the first two plus exact remaining counts; with two or fewer, no false overflow appears; desktop behavior and API contract remain unchanged; focused Command Center test and dashboard typecheck pass.
notes: Implemented by passing complete blocker/forbidden-claim collections to MobileDailyTriage, showing two details above the fold, and exposing exact remaining counts in collapsed disclosures. Desktop/API behavior unchanged. Proof: CommandCenterRoute 3/3; dashboard typecheck pass; git diff --check pass.
close_reason: Mobile triage is compact but no longer silently hides safety overflow.

title: Keep content work-item selection synchronized with the URL
description: ContentWorkflowSurface initializes selectedWorkItemId from route search once and then owns it in React useState. Browser back/forward or any router-driven search change after mount leaves the visible work item and API queries bound to stale local state.
design: Make the typed router search parameter the single source of selection truth. Selection actions update the URL; render/query state derives from the current URL on every router state change. Preserve existing safe default when the requested ID is unknown and continue clearing section_heading/planning_digest on an explicit new selection.
acceptance_criteria: Changing work_item_id through router navigation after mount causes the selected candidate and snapshot query to follow the new valid ID without remounting; explicit selection still updates URL and clears stale section focus; unknown IDs keep the existing API-owned fallback; focused dashboard test and typecheck pass.
notes: Implemented a validated content-workflow search contract and removed React-owned work-item selection. The route now derives selection from reactive searchStr; explicit changes still clear section focus and an external history/search change selects the new evidenced candidate after mount. Focused proof: ContentWorkflowSurface 29/29; dashboard typecheck pass; git diff --check pass. Initial falsifier stayed red until the route search was typed and the test stopped asserting against a detached pre-remount DOM node.
close_reason: URL is now the single reactive source for work-item selection and focused proof passes.

title: Remove fake content editor capabilities
description: The draft step renders inert formatting controls and Wstaw dowód as plain spans. They do nothing, while the API correctly requires evidence assignment in the reviewed section map.
design: Delete the fake toolbar. Keep the direct section textarea and existing save/restore/review actions. Do not build a rich-text editor or browser-side evidence mutation; add a real control only after an API-owned contract exists.
acceptance_criteria: The draft workbench no longer advertises formatting/link/list/evidence insertion controls that have no production behavior; actual editable section text and evidence lineage remain unchanged; touched dashboard proof and typecheck pass.
notes: Implemented by deleting the inert paragraph/B/I/link/list/evidence toolbar from ContentPageWorkbench while preserving section editing, evidence display, save/restore, and review actions. Proof: pnpm --filter @wilq/dashboard exec vitest run src/routes/ContentWorkflowSurface.test.tsx --reporter=dot (28 passed); pnpm --filter @wilq/dashboard typecheck (pass); git diff --check (pass).
close_reason: Fake controls removed; real API-owned editing and evidence lineage remain.

title: Persist negative human content reviews as exact audit decisions
description: The content human-review routes persist only when wordpress_handoff_allowed. Valid needs_changes, rejected and deferred decisions therefore disappear after reload and reviewed_item remains missing, erasing the exact reviewer decision that should drive correction.
design: Separate recordability from approval. Persist a review only when its reviewer, work-item, evidence/checklist and draft binding are structurally valid; apply its decision to reviewed_item even when handoff stays blocked. Invalid or mismatched submissions remain unpersisted.
acceptance_criteria: A structurally valid needs_changes/rejected/deferred review is persisted and returned after reload with wordpress_handoff_allowed=false; wrong-work-item, missing-reviewer/evidence/checklist and mismatched-draft submissions remain unpersisted; API/shared schema/dashboard consume the same typed recorded state; focused public proof covers both paths.
notes: Implemented separate review_recordable and review_recorded states. Structurally valid negative/deferred decisions update reviewed_item and persist on snapshot/selected-item routes while wordpress_handoff_allowed stays false; pure preflight never claims storage. Stored snapshot readback marks recorded=true, invalid bindings/reviewer/evidence/checklist remain unpersisted, and latest review follows SQLite insertion order rather than lexical ID. Focused proof: 4 Python falsifiers passed; shared schemas 42 passed/10 skipped; dashboard typecheck passed; Ruff and diff-check passed; managed live snapshot after restart returned recordable=false, recorded=false, handoff=false with no review.
close_reason: Exact negative human decisions now survive reload without being confused with approval or WordPress authorization.

title: Run real Merchant issue and product-identity pilot
description: Prove one marketer-useful commerce workflow on current Ekologus Merchant evidence: prioritize a real issue cluster, show occurrence semantics, exact product identity/coverage and performance availability, then prepare a review-only fix queue.
design: Use Issue Resolution facts honestly; enrich with Merchant Reporting only if access is ready. No feed write, no uniqueness claim from occurrences and no cross-source performance join without exact identity.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh current Merchant evidence yields one prioritized issue decision with affected sample IDs, reported-occurrence counts, pagination/coverage, identity status, evidence/action IDs and safe native-UI handoff; all actions remain apply_allowed=false; real marketer review is separate.
close_reason: Fresh Merchant read, prioritized issue/identity queue, samples, evidence, coverage semantics, and apply=false native review previews are live-proven; performance and price unknowns remain typed blockers.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Live Merchant pilot 2026-07-18: read-only refresh refresh_google_merchant_center_641d9ff07669 completed; fresh age ~0h, 10,484 products, 15 issue groups, 1,802 reported issue-product occurrences, 11 product samples, no disapproved products, no pending products, 60 expiring. title: Run real GSC and GA4 landing-alignment pilot
description: After readiness, identity, lineage and source-quality contracts are honest, run one exact Ekologus landing-page diagnosis joining current GSC, GA4 and WordPress evidence. The output must answer what to inspect and why without claiming conversion readiness, decay or causation.
design: Use current WILQ API and one sanitized marketer packet/view; do not add an exporter. Freeze source assessments and join digest. Real marketer review is recorded separately.
acceptance_criteria: Current connector reads produce one exact/ambiguous/missing landing decision with evidence IDs, windows, match confidence, GA4 key-event/data-quality state and safe next step; no false trend or conversion claim; packet survives reload/readback; real Wilku verdict remains unclaimed until recorded.

title: Make connector capability registry match real adapters
description: Merchant, Localo, LinkedIn and Facebook advertise write=True or write-like supported_actions without corresponding mutation adapters; Ahrefs advertises abstract labels that are not ActionObject IDs. Capability surfaces can imply work WILQ cannot perform.
design: Derive or explicitly declare read adapter, mutation adapter, active product scope and real ActionObject IDs. Unimplemented experimental capabilities remain false/blocked with a reason. Do not add vendor writes to satisfy the registry.
acceptance_criteria: Every advertised read/write/action capability maps to an implemented public seam; Merchant/Localo/social remain review-only unless separately authorized; Ahrefs labels resolve to real action IDs or are removed; dashboard/skills no longer imply unsupported execution.
notes:
Red baseline on live /api/connectors at d2649f15: google_ads, google_merchant_center, localo, wordpress_sklep, linkedin and facebook all report capabilities.write=true although wilq.actions.mutation_contract.supported_mutation_adapter exposes only the exact wordpress_ekologus draft adapter. Ahrefs exposes abstract supported_actions with no ActionObject inventory. Implement the typed capability truth after the active Claude quality synthesis; do not add vendor writes.
Implemented adapter-bound capability truth. Connector definitions now explicitly declare read and mutation adapters with an import-time consistency invariant; shared/API/context contracts expose read/write, action_scope, adapters and blockers. Removed unimplemented action types (Demand Gen mode plan, GSC pseudo-action, GA4 landing pseudo-action, Merchant feed edit, Ahrefs gap labels, Localo GBP, Sheets export/import, sklep draft/content, Codex pseudo-actions). Social remains prepare/review-only without read or publish adapters. Focused proof: 2 API tests passed; shared schemas 42 passed/10 skipped; dashboard RegistryPanels suite 174 passed; dashboard typecheck passed; Ruff and diff-check passed. Managed live smoke after restart shows only wordpress_ekologus write=true/draft_only with wordpress_draft_execution_boundary.
close_reason: Connector capability API, dashboard and skill context now match implemented read/review/draft adapters; unsupported writes and action types are no longer advertised.

title: Model source recency, settlement, window and data quality separately
description: A generic 48-hour freshness concept is applied across GA4, Ahrefs, Merchant and Localo although GA4 attribution can settle later, Ahrefs is a manual lag-1 snapshot, and Localo GBP facts are trailing-30-day aggregates. Fresh collection time is being asked to mean too much.
design: Extend source assessment with collected_at, covered_window, settlement_state, quality_state, completeness/cap and interpretation caveats. Connector-specific policy owns semantics; shared views render them without a universal magic score.
acceptance_criteria: GA4 can be recently collected but still settling/quality-unverified; Ahrefs names its snapshot date and manual cadence; Localo preserves series bounds and place coverage; downstream recommendations bind the exact source assessment digest and stale/settling changes invalidate review.
notes:
2026-07-18: fresh checker marketer-metric-context-fixed-iPfssp schema-valid. Reviewer raised F1/F2/F3, but F1/F2 are rejected with current guards (empty evidence IDs filtered and len!=1 continues; comparison periods require two non-empty strings); F3 is a typed-contract concern only. Disposition recorded outside repo; no PASS/approval claim.
2026-07-18: found and fixed async connector refresh seam: _persist_refresh_result now derives covered_window, settlement_state and quality_state through the same _quality_contract as synchronous refresh. Before fix, fresh GA4 async run had date_start/date_end only in metric_summary while covered_window was empty and quality unknown. Focused test 4 passed; live async GA4 refresh refresh_google_analytics_4_5b60fde574ae now exposes 2026-06-19..2026-07-16, settling, unverified.
2026-07-18 final verification: refresh quality contract + measurement evidence/aggregate/publication suites 16 passed. Connector-specific windows are typed: GA4 settling/unverified with date bounds, Ahrefs manual_lag_1_snapshot/domain_snapshot, Localo trailing_30_days/active_places/count. Planning lineage tests prove quality/settlement/window fields participate in source input and digest. Async refresh now uses same contract as sync. Closed as implemented; pilot/owner review remains separate.

title: Make GSC decay and cannibalization lineage executable or absent
description: Content diagnostics attach decay and cannibalization expert-rule IDs while the connector reads one latest finalized day capped at 1000 query/page rows and decision code has no period comparison or page history. The lineage promises reasoning that cannot execute.
design: Immediately remove inactive rule lineage from snapshot decisions, or introduce a bounded paged comparison-period contract with explicit coverage and stored history before restoring it. Do not infer trend from one day.
acceptance_criteria: No decision cites decay/cannibalization without the rule's required page_history/comparison_period inputs; if the bounded history read is built, windows, row caps, paging and partial/top-row semantics are visible and a real period delta drives the decision.
notes: 2026-07-17: usunięto decay/cannibalization expert lineage z GSC content diagnostics, bo aktualny snapshot nie dostarcza page history/comparison period. Reguły pozostają w katalogu, ale decyzje nie cytują ich bez wymaganych danych. Dodany focused falsifier test_gsc_content_diagnostics_do_not_claim_unavailable_trend_rules; Ruff/diff green.
close_reason: Removed decay/cannibalization lineage from GSC content diagnostics until required comparison history exists; added falsifier and state note.

title: Add cross-source landing identity and canonicalization contract
description: GSC page, GA4 landingPagePlusQueryString and WordPress URL are currently joined by normalized host/path, unconditionally dropping query strings. This correctly removes many tracking parameters but can collapse functionally distinct landing pages and hides match ambiguity.
design: Create one API-owned landing identity contract with canonical URL, recognized tracking parameters, functional query handling, host aliases, match tier, candidate IDs and review-required ambiguity. Reuse it in content, GA4, Ads landing alignment and planning.
acceptance_criteria: Exact, tracking-only, functional-query, host-alias, ambiguous and missing cases produce distinct observable results; no downstream decision treats ambiguous/path fallback as exact; both content pilots and Ads landing alignment consume the same identity contract.
notes:
Validated campaign finding metric-dimensions-fragment-breaks-lag-and-url-join: GSC page and GA4 landing_page values are persisted verbatim, while DuckDB LAG partitions exact dimensions_json and read-side matching strips query strings later. Extend this owner to normalize/store typed identity before trend partitioning while preserving functional-query ambiguity.
2026-07-17 first production slice: added typed LandingPageIdentity/Resolution with exact, tracking_only, host_alias, path_only, functional_query, ambiguous, missing and no_match; scheme/effective port are origin-bound; malformed connector URLs return invalid; only recognized tracking params are removed; functional query order is preserved. Content demand, exact GSC snapshot, WordPress publication binding and publication-bound measurement now use the shared matcher; all URL dimensions in one metric fact must agree. Host alias lookups query both approved Ekologus hosts and UTM-only demand facts group under one canonical identity. Focused proof: 16 passed, 2 skipped before review fixes; post-fix identity/publication tests 6 passed; mypy 4 files clean; Ruff clean; git diff --check clean. Independent read-only review found four actionable findings, all fixed, then PASS on exact fixes (2 focused tests). Claude checker attempt 1 validly returned evidence_gap due incomplete embedded evidence; attempt 2 timed out with no output, so neither is represented as PASS. Remaining in this Bead: move query-aware identity ahead of the metric-store LIMIT / persist identity for LAG, project tiers/source status to API planning, and connect Ads landing alignment plus both pilots before closure.
2026-07-18: list_metric_facts_for_content_url now filters exact landing identity before bounded read and computes previous_value/delta/trend with an identity-partitioned LAG. Legacy URL rows are normalized into the same partition; invalid mixed URL dimensions are still removed before caller limit. Existing metric-store suite 16 passed; focused landing identity test proves newer outsourcing fact sees prior value 10 and delta +5 while unrelated service/noisy dimensions stay excluded.
2026-07-18 second-opinion review (fixed point b6d1055 dirty) found real SPEC-001: SQL LAG ran before Python metric_dimensions_match_landing, allowing a filtered legacy/noisy URL to influence returned previous_value. Fixed by removing SQL LAG and computing history only after public identity filtering; added interloper falsifier (exact row after invalid newer row keeps previous evidence from exact row). The review's separate STD-001 was an artifact excerpt typo (actual SQL had more selected expressions); not retained. Metric-store suite 16 passed.
close_reason: Shared landing identity, metric-store exact filtering, planning source status and Ads binding are implemented and focused-verified; exact/ambiguous/missing/functional cases remain distinct and fail-closed.

title: Fix GA4 conversion and key-event readiness truth
description: GA4 readiness currently becomes ready when conversion-like metric facts exist, but the connector emits requested metric facts even when keyEvents and other values are zero. Daily-check can therefore say conversion metrics are confirmed without verified key-event configuration.
design: Split metric-column availability, observed non-zero values and key-event configuration provenance. If configuration cannot be read, state it as unverified and block profitability/funnel/attribution conclusions without suppressing useful traffic-quality analysis.
acceptance_criteria: A GA4 response with behavior rows and zero key events does not claim configured/ready conversions; verified configuration and non-zero observations are distinct typed states; daily-check and ga4-analyst use the same contract; focused proof falsifies the current false-positive.
notes: Implemented typed separation of metric-column availability, non-zero observed facts, and key-event configuration provenance. Zero-valued conversion-like facts now yield review_required with blocked conversion/profitability claims; the daily false-positive guard and ga4-analyst consume the same readiness contract. Focused proof: 3 targeted pytest falsifiers passed; shared schemas 42 passed/10 skipped; dashboard tsc --noEmit passed; Ruff and git diff --check passed; managed API smoke returned review_required, 275 conversion-like facts, 0 non-zero observed facts, unverified configuration, blocker_count 1.
close_reason: False-ready GA4 conversion state removed and verified across API, shared schema, dashboard fixture, daily guard and operator skill.

title: Cross-source evidence integrity and marketer pilots
description: Make WILQ's GSC, GA4, Ahrefs, WordPress, Merchant, Localo/GBP and social evidence composable without silent identity, coverage, freshness or capability lies. Build shared typed joins and source semantics, then prove the smallest real marketer workflows instead of adding disconnected connector cards.
design: WILQ API owns identity, coverage, window, settlement, quality and capability truth. Dashboard and skills render those fields. Reuse existing ActionObject and measurement loops; keep vendor writes human-gated. Prefer deleting false lineage/placeholders/capability declarations and reducing scripts over building ceremony.
acceptance_criteria: Exact landing and product identities have observable match confidence; GA4 readiness/data quality and source windows cannot overclaim; connector registry matches real adapters; WordPress/Ahrefs/Merchant/Localo/social each expose an honest bounded workflow; at least one read-only cross-source pilot is completed with current evidence and separate real Wilku review. No vendor write, causal outcome or production-ready claim.

title: Make Campaign Builder deliver its advertised review contract
description: The skill advertises campaign structure, keywords, assets, sitelinks, budget, targeting and previews, while its current smoke proves only connector/context/action presence and a landing candidate. This can pass without producing a useful campaign review.
design: Either complete an API-owned typed CampaignReviewProposal for one service or narrow the skill triggers/output promise to the existing capability. Proof must inspect the generated operator result, not private call order or prose snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: For one exact service the operator gets an evidence-bound review proposal containing only supported fields, explicit missing inputs and human-only budget/target decisions; or the skill promise is narrowed. A focused non-interactive eval rejects invented keywords, assets, budgets and readiness.
notes: 2026-07-18: narrowed the skill and output contract to the API's actual review-only capability. It now explicitly exposes only existing campaign candidates, derived KPIs, budget preview metadata, human gates, target context, missing contracts, blocked claims and evidence/action IDs; keywords, assets, sitelinks, ad copy, targeting, target budgets, forecasts and readiness are blocked until a typed contract exists. Updated agent prompt and added smoke guard rejecting unsupported generator fields. Proof: campaign smoke against live API returned 2 valid actions and 4 landing candidates; focused context/eval tests 15 passed.

title: Expose bounded Google Ads search-term coverage
description: Search-term reads are capped at 50 rows for 30 days and 200 rows for the 90-day safety window; Google also omits low-volume terms. The API, shared schema, dashboard and Ads skills currently expose rows without a durable completeness/sample contract, and n-grams inherit the same bounded sample.
design: Add typed read-window, requested/returned row count, connector cap, privacy-omission caveat and downstream sample lineage. Do not call the sample complete and do not invent the number of omitted terms.
acceptance_criteria: A marketer sees the 30/90-day windows, returned counts, caps and privacy caveat wherever search terms, n-grams or negative candidates are used. Focused proof shows n-gram and negative-keyword lineage preserves the source sample contract.
notes: 2026-07-18: fresh second-opinion checker dEB332 was rejected by validate-review.py because Claude cited >20 evidence lines; no JSON/PASS retained. Disposition records rejection. Local/live proof remains valid and bounded.
close_reason: Typed bounded search-term coverage is wired through diagnostics, n-grams, safety/negative flows and dashboard; focused integration and contract proofs pass. Google privacy omission and caps remain explicit; no exhaustive-universe claim.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-18 verification: bounded search-term contract is present at API schemas, all 30d/90d search-term, n-gram and safety contracts carry window, requested/returned count, cap, bounded_sample status and Google privacy omission caveat. Integration test test_ads_diagnostics_exposes_live_campaign_metric_facts plus summary/mixed-currency falsifiers and dashboard typecheck pass. No complete-universe claim.

title: Ads operating loop: diagnosis, campaign review and measurement
description: Turn the existing safe Ads substrate into a marketer-useful operating loop for Ekologus. The loop must join fresh Google Ads evidence, prioritized diagnosis, search-term and negative-keyword review, campaign design promises, human execution boundaries and post-change observation without inventing metrics or implying vendor writes.
design: Keep WILQ review-only for Google Ads until a separate human decision authorizes a mutation adapter. WILQ API owns typed coverage/window/freshness/lineage contracts; dashboard and skills render them. Prefer deletion and one real read/review pilot over more scripts or placeholder surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: One exact Ekologus service completes a fresh Ads read/review pilot with a prioritized evidence-bound decision, bounded search-term coverage, reviewable campaign/negative-keyword output, explicit human execution step and observation plan. Quality Score and multi-window/currency ambiguity are resolved honestly. No vendor write, causal outcome claim or fake Wilku UAT.

title: Run real exact two-pilot plans, full drafts and review package after gates
description: After service cards, query mapping, internal links, outsourcing inventory, semantic storage and WordPress authoring profile are ready, run the same current API workflow for exact BDO and consulting/outsourcing. Use real server-side Codex app-server, persist full v2 revisions and semantic findings, iterate selected sections under human review, and prepare exact WordPress dry-runs. Do not claim UAT or 10/10 without named human results.
acceptance_criteria: Both exact pilots have current generated plans, full immutable revisions with all page assets, deterministic and persisted semantic reviews, child diffs where requested, exact dry-runs and reviewer forms. No critical/high finding remains before human acceptance; all evidence/query/claim/link lineage is valid; model/runtime failures leave no partial state; real Wilku verdict and any WordPress apply remain separate human records.
notes: 2026-07-17 exact measurement binding hardening: stage_measurement no longer falls back to work-item-wide legacy WordPress execution when request has no handoff/revision binding. Added falsifier proving an unbound legacy execution cannot create a measurement window; publication-bound suite 5 passed. Exact handoff/revision path remains green.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text:
# Disposition — 2026-07-19 Codex provider runtime

## Retained findings

None. The checker returned no line-cited findings.

## Evidence gaps / follow-up

- The isolated real structured turn still ended in `codex_timeout` after 90s.
- The checker retained eight evidence gaps because the prompt did not include
  the source diff as review evidence; this is a review coverage limitation, not
  a PASS.
- A completion proof against installed `codex-cli 0.144.6` is still required
  before retrying the BDO planning POST.

## Local verification

- `pytest tests/content/test_codex_app_server_transport.py`: pass.
- Ruff and mypy for the changed transport: pass.
- `validate-review.py check`: `valid evidence-bounded review`.
- No proposal, revision, WordPress write, approval, or UAT was created by the
  failed real probe.

## Does not prove

This pass does not prove the runtime fix works end-to-end, that planning is
available, or that the pilot is ready for marketer use.

## Owner

Codex transport/runtime diagnosis remains owned by the active goal. Next safe
step is a fresh bounded runtime investigation or an operator-authorized
runtime/config change; no fallback model path is allowed.

title: Run sharded full-WILQ research and fixed-point challenge
description: Run a source-bound Claude research campaign over the current clean WILQ fixed point. Cover the full Marketing Operating System, not only content: content+metrics, Ads/campaigns, GA4/GSC/Ahrefs/Merchant/Localo/social, ActionObject safety, measurement/learning, operator UX/skills, runtime/ops and architecture. Independent shards produce validated mechanism/gap ledgers; synthesis may consume only validated shard results. Locally verify each retained claim and convert accepted findings into a dependency-aware Beads graph. No repo product scripts, no autonomous writes, no fake approval or UAT.
design: Use one disposable clean detached worktree at commit 2b05a902 because the active checkout contains user-owned AGENTS.md changes. Keep campaign artifacts outside the repo. Use separate research shards with observable domain boundaries followed by one synthesis. Unlimited Claude budget is explicitly authorized for this window, but one expensive run executes at a time.
acceptance_criteria: Campaign manifest validates; every required shard completes or is explicitly unavailable; synthesis validates against all dependencies; disposition classifies every recommendation as accept_and_fix, evidence_gap, reject_with_evidence, follow_up or human_decision. Accepted work becomes durable Beads with dependencies, acceptance criteria and source/result IDs. Active checkout retains only user AGENTS.md plus intentional Beads/state changes; no vendor write, model-generated product mutation, real-UAT claim or production-readiness claim.
notes:
Content research campaign v2 completed on fixed commit 2b05a902 with three validated ledgers plus validated synthesis: selection-planning, document-quality-handoff, marketer-workflow, content-synthesis. Original overbroad shard failed with Claude exit 1; minimal repo and repo+URL repros passed, proving the repair was narrower bounded shards. Local disposition accepted intent-aware query mapping, evidence-bound internal links, skill/API reconciliation + packet-builder reduction, legacy revision-route removal, outsourcing inventory recovery, semantic storage activation, WordPress authoring profile and gated exact-pilot integration. Created dependency-aware Beads wilq-seo-1oa.36.9 through .36.16; .36.16 depends on .9/.10/.13/.14/.15 and existing lt1, and real UAT jst depends on .36.16. Accessibility aria-live claim was classified evidence_gap; deleting source assessments and internal links was rejected.

Replacement campaign pinned the three results by SHA-256, completed narrower social audit and validated synthesis. Created epic wilq-seo-v9ab.18 with children .1-.14 for GA4 truth, typed joins, GSC lineage, source semantics, registry truth, connector workflows, script deletion and three real pilots.

title: Persist semantic content review and selected-section revisions
description: Dodać API-owned, persistowany advisory semantic review związany z exact ContentDraftRevision.content_digest, criteria_version i CodexRun ID. Review ocenia bezpośredniość odpowiedzi, kompletność, logikę, konkretność, powtórzenia, zgodność z intencją, buyer fit, wiarygodność i konwersję; nigdy nie zatwierdza treści, nie zmienia deterministic quality gates i nie wykonuje vendor write. GET pozostaje model-free. Findings tworzą trwałą instrukcję; człowiek wybiera sekcje, a istniejący app-server tworzy immutable child revision zmieniając tylko wybrane sekcje i zachowując wszystkie pozostałe page assets oraz lineage. Dashboard Review pokazuje findings, exact binding i jedno bezpieczne przejście do poprawy.
acceptance_criteria: POST semantic-review wymaga exact latest revision ID+digest, zapisuje immutable advisory result z criteria version/run ID i publish_ready=false; stale digest jest 409 przed modelem, runtime/persistence failure nie pozostawia częściowego review, GET nie uruchamia modelu. Deterministyczne gates i human decision pozostają osobnymi władzami; semantic review nie może ustawić approved ani utworzyć ActionObject. Selected-section improvement wymaga jawnie wybranych stabilnych section_id, zachowuje niezmienione sekcje i wszystkie v2 page assets, tworzy child revision unreviewed, blokuje obce/duplikowane ID i stale base, nie wykonuje vendor write. Dwa syntetyczne pełne dokumenty przechodzą ten sam kontrakt; shared schema/dashboard focused proof i independent fixed-point review przechodzą. State docs, Bead, commit i push są aktualne.
close_reason: Persisted exact-digest advisory semantic review and human-selected stable-ID child revisions are implemented, verified, independently challenged, and repaired. External activation/UAT/vendor blockers remain outside this Bead.

Podłączyć marketer-facing krok Tekst i page-like preview wszystkich assets. Evidence IDs i trace są poniżej fold, a decyzja i treść są głównym UX. Bez browser model call, fallbacku, vendor write i realnej migracji storage.
acceptance_criteria: Exact work item wymaga approved_current karty, approved/current scope i section map, aktualnego proposal/input digest oraz braku wcześniejszej rewizji. Stale, missing, blocked lub review-required input oraz model failure zwracają typed blocker i nie zapisują częściowego dokumentu. Sukces zapisuje jeden pełny ContentDraftRevision v2 zawsze unreviewed i publish_ready=false. Preview pokazuje title/meta/H1/lead/sections/FAQ/CTA/internal links, a metryki i identyfikatory źródeł są dostępne poniżej fold. Dwie syntetyczne zatwierdzone karty i temp SQLite tworzą dwa różne drafty przez ten sam kontrakt. GET nie uruchamia modelu. Focused API/shared-schema/dashboard proof przechodzi, stan docs jest aktualny, fixed-point review wykonany, zmiany commitnięte i wypchnięte.

title: Normalize bounded local verification for Codex execution limits
description: A single scripts/verify.sh run crossed the executor wall after reaching 43% of backend pytest and was terminated with signal 143, forcing manual, error-prone file grouping and earlier causing an accidental duplicate pytest run. The repository needs one deterministic bounded way to run the canonical verification in resumable, non-overlapping stages without hardcoding today's test filenames or rerunning green gates.
design: Preserve scripts/verify.sh as the canonical broad human/CI gate. Add the smallest deterministic repository-owned sharding/stage seam that derives sorted backend test files, validates shard index/total and prints the exact pytest selection. Update the existing AGENTS.md testing section with evergreen rules: focused falsifier first, one broad pass near completion, one expensive process at a time, no duplicate pytest, disjoint deterministic shards when the wall requires them, managed stack lifecycle, and no rerun of a green gate unless relevant code changed. Do not add a status checker, snapshot, test inventory or parallel framework.
acceptance_criteria: 1. One documented command deterministically selects a non-overlapping backend shard from the current tests tree without a maintained filename list. 2. Invalid shard inputs fail clearly and union proof shows every backend test file is selected exactly once. 3. AGENTS.md contains one concise canonical testing contract and commands, including the required rtk prefixes. 4. Focused runner falsifier/smoke and diff check pass; state record, Bead, deliberate commit and push are updated.
close_reason: Deterministic bounded backend verification and evergreen executor rules implemented and proven.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Problem reproduced: monolithic verify reached 43% backend pytest then executor terminated it with signal 143, and manual grouping was error-prone. Minimal fix: scripts/test_backend_shard.py discovers sorted tests/**/test_*.py and selects INDEX/TOTAL by stable stride; no maintained inventory or alternate CI. Focused falsifier proves 8-way union equals all discovered files, total cardinality proves no overlap, and invalid 0/8, 9/8, 1/0, wat fail. Runtime smoke --shard 1/128 executed 2 files / 15 tests. Ruff and diff check pass. AGENTS.md now records shell authority, mandatory rtk/uv, focused-first, one costly process, no duplicate pytest, one broad pass, deterministic shards and managed-stack lifecycle. docs/PROGRESS.md updated.

Legacy OpenAI runtime/SDK, env/live flag, direct dependency, frontend helpers/panels and obsolete public schemas are removed only after reference proof. 4. Focused OpenAPI/proposal/skill smoke plus non-interactive content-operator eval pass; state records, Bead, commit and push are updated.
close_reason: One exact Codex content-model entrypoint remains; legacy API-key runtime and all public contract leaks are removed with focused proof.

title: Wire grounded Codex section revisions into the draft step
description: The verified server-side proposal seam is invisible to Wilku. In the active Treści i SEO journey the marketer still sees a misleading Sprawdź tekst szkicu action tied to WordPress dry-run and cannot choose feedback-targeted sections, invoke Codex, compare the child revision or understand why quality remains blocked. Minimal slice: wire the existing exact-revision endpoint into the active draft workspace; do not add a browser runtime, prompt box, fallback model or new product endpoint.
design: React consumes typed API-owned revision/proposal contracts. Show the proposal control only for the exact latest eligible base revision and headings; otherwise explain the preceding save/review step. Use compact section checkboxes, one primary generation CTA, loading/fail-closed error, then a base-versus-child comparison limited to selected sections with run status, evidence/claim lineage, quality findings and semantic human-review warning. No approval, ActionObject, WordPress write or direct Codex access. Remove the misleading dry-run/legacy UI entry only after reference proof; do not delete required technical API seams in this slice.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Active draft step lets Wilku select one or more exact base headings and invoke POST /api/content/work-items/{work_item_id}/draft-revisions/{base_revision_id}/codex-proposal through a typed frontend boundary. 2. Browser never receives runtime configuration or free-form system prompt; stale base, invalid heading and blocked contract remain fail-closed with marketer-readable Polish copy. 3. Successful child shows selected-section base-versus-child comparison, run status, evidence/claim lineage, quality findings, publish_ready=false and semantic review requirement; it cannot approve or touch WordPress. 4. The misleading WordPress dry-run CTA is absent from the normal writing step and no alternate model runtime is exposed. 5. Focused Vitest, TypeScript, API smoke and 1440x900 plus 390x844 browser proof protect the concrete workflow and no horizontal overflow. 6. Usefulness row, state record, Bead, deliberate commit and push are updated without claiming 10/10.
close_reason: Acceptance met for the bounded dashboard proposal slice; alternate legacy runtime remains explicitly open in wilq-seo-r564.14.

comments.author: korneliuszburian

Usunięto mylący marketerowy WordPress dry-run CTA oraz potwierdzone martwe panele. Proof: focused backend do 100%, cztery rozłączne backend shardy + non-content shard (jedyny stale-eval failure naprawiony świeżym wilq-content-operator evalem), Ruff/mypy, shared 38/38, dashboard tests/TS/ESLint/build, security, deterministic + non-interactive skill eval, Playwright 1440x900 i 390x844 bez overflow/WordPress request. title: Preserve normalized content paths through context redaction
description: Broad verification exposed a stable public-boundary bug: content diagnostics returns a safe normalized_page_path, but POST /api/codex/context-pack changes the same value to [REDACTED] because generic token-like matching overrides the safe identifier key. Minimal repair: validate server-owned normalized path shapes before generic value redaction while still rejecting secret-bearing or malformed paths.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A normalized absolute content path remains unchanged through redact_mapping and the content strategist context pack. 2. Secret-like or malformed path values remain redacted. 3. Existing focused redaction contract and the original context-pack repro pass. 4. State record, Bead close and deliberate publication evidence are updated.
close_reason: Safe normalized content paths survive context redaction while malformed and secret-like shapes fail closed; focused and original public repros pass.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Potwierdzona przyczyna: generic token redaction nadpisywała server-owned normalized_page_path. Minimalna naprawa zachowuje wyłącznie canonical absolute string albo None; traversal raw/encoded, query, percent, relative path, list/mapping i długie opaque atomy są fail-closed do [REDACTED]. Proof: focused redaction 5/5, Ruff green, mypy green, pierwotny publiczny context-pack repro 1/1, security.sh green. Niezależny security re-review: no findings; residual pozostaje jawny — składnia nie odróżni sekretu celowo uformowanego jak wieloczłonowy slug, więc kontrakt zależy od server-owned provenance pola.

title: Propose grounded section child revisions through Codex app-server
description: Problem: marketer-facing generation is not grounded because the old model request omits API-owned sections, source facts, claim markers and blocked constraints; quality review was also detached from durable child content. Minimal slice: one server-side WILQ API operation for selected section keys invokes local Codex app-server through existing ChatGPT login, persists sanitized status, validates strict typed lineage plus known blocked/high-risk body language and returns an unreviewed child revision whose quality review scores only persisted selected sections. Browser never talks to Codex; no API key, Agents SDK, Ollama, fallback, approval or vendor write.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Caller selects an exact work item, latest base revision/digest and section headings. 2. Codex receives the full API-owned structured model input; unknown evidence/claim identifiers, literal known blocked claims and the bounded high-risk promise/compliance vocabulary cannot be persisted. Arbitrary semantic grounding is not claimed and remains mandatory human review. 3. Result is an unreviewed child revision with typed provenance and quality findings scoped to persisted selected sections, never approval, ActionObject or WordPress write. 4. Focused falsifiers prove full grounded input, body-only claim leakage, model-only delivery fields excluded from quality credit, atomic persistence and fail-closed tool attempts. 5. Real repo-local app-server proof uses existing codex login, sanitized output and no secret/API key. 6. State docs, Bead, deliberate commit and push are updated.
close_reason: Grounded Codex section proposal creates only an atomic unreviewed child revision with typed lineage, persisted-section quality scope and fail-closed runtime/claim guards; focused, real-runtime and independent review proof pass.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Slice spełnia bounded kontrakt: WILQ API pobiera exact latest base/digest i pełny typed input, uruchamia izolowany Codex app-server przez istniejący codex login bez API key/fallbacku, odrzuca obcy lineage, literalny blocked claim, bounded high-risk language i każdą zaobserwowaną próbę tool/server request. Zapisuje wyłącznie unreviewed child revision wraz z terminalnym CodexRun w jednej transakcji; quality obejmuje tylko persisted selected sections and declared lineage, a semantic_review_required pozostaje true. Proof: 29 focused tests, Ruff i mypy green; realny syntetyczny app-server run utworzył v2 dla 1 sekcji, 38 słów, 2 evidence IDs, zero mutation auditów, publish_ready=false, external_call_attempted=false, verdict needs_changes. Independent Standards/Spec i security review: no findings po dwóch naprawionych findingach. Broad verify: 986 passed, 2 skipped, jedyny fail ujawnił osobny bug redakcji zamknięty w r564.12; original repro jest green. Po restarcie health, metrics, content queue i dashboard zwracają 200; content-operator i content-strategist smokes przechodzą. Residuals: stock app-server nie daje uniwersalnej gwarancji wyłączenia przyszłych built-ins, lexical guard nie jest semantic verifierem, usefulness pozostaje 5/10 do dashboard wiring, Service Profile i Wilku UAT.

title: Run exact WordPress draft ActionObject inline in Content Workflow
description: Problem: marketer zatwierdza dokładną rewizję, ale /content-workflow odsyła do ogólnego ekranu akcji bez revision bindingu. Minimalny zakres: jeden zwarty wizard w dev_draft; binding wyłącznie z API handoffu; identyczny binding przez validate/preview, review, confirm, impact i apply; resume tylko z pasujących audit events; typed 409 bez retry; odświeżenie snapshot/readiness/activation; bez nowego endpointu, realnego WordPress write, publish/update/delete i alternatywnego runtime. Proof: focused Vitest oraz syntetyczny desktop/mobile browser proof.
close_reason: Exact revision inline ActionObject flow is implemented and focused proofs pass; real WordPress write and content-quality claims remain outside this slice.

API-owned binding is preserved through preview, review, confirm, impact and apply; newest same-binding ordered audit resumes the flow; typed terminal apply conflicts lock without retry; successful apply refreshes snapshot, activation, readiness and readback. Proof: dashboard API/UI 32/32, TypeScript, focused ESLint, dashboard build, synthetic desktop/mobile Playwright 1/1, git diff check and independent fixed-point review with no findings. Every ActionObject mutation was intercepted in browser proof; no real WordPress write, publish, update or delete occurred. Content-generation usefulness remains a separate 5/10 gap and is not claimed by this closure.

title: Bind WordPress draft apply to the exact approved content revision
description: Pilot safety bug: the real WordPress ActionObject apply capability still loads mutable latest_human_review, rebuilds a snapshot without revision state, and can pass write_authorization_verified=true without proving that preview/review/confirm refer to the exact approved content revision. The adapter can therefore receive outline notes instead of the text a human approved.
design: Use one canonical revision-bound resolver at the existing WordPress handoff seam. It must load the current revision workspace, require an approved exact review, bind work_item_id, revision_id, content_digest, draft_package_id, draft_package_digest, approval_decision_id and canonical URL, derive section overrides only from immutable revision sections, and return typed blockers before any adapter call. Carry the same binding through ActionObject preview/review/confirm/apply and mutation audit. Legacy package review/audit may remain readable for old dry-run views but must never authorize vendor apply for a revision-enabled work item. No new endpoint, fallback runtime, publication path or destructive write.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Approved v1 reaches only a synthetic draft adapter and the emitted section bodies equal v1. 2. A child v2 or changed package/canonical/evidence invalidates the complete v1 preview/review/confirm/apply chain before adapter. 3. Wrong revision ID, content digest, package digest or approval decision ID returns a typed blocker with adapter_reached=false and external_write_attempted=false. 4. Legacy human-review/audit cannot authorize ActionObject apply for a revision-enabled work item. 5. ActionObject preview, review, confirmation and audit retain one exact binding; cross-work-item or cross-version events do not count. 6. Publish/update/delete remain false and proof uses synthetic/staging draft-only material. 7. Focused backend/API proof, relevant schema/typecheck, state record, Bead close, deliberate commit and push pass.
close_reason: Exact approved revision is bound through handoff and single-use ActionObject apply; concurrency, replay, crash recovery, redaction and draft-only proofs pass.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Rozpoczęto po pushu 654e27b2. Potwierdzony seam: wordpress_draft_apply_capability używa legacy latest_human_review, nie ładuje revision_state, ustawia write_authorization_verified na stałe i nie przekazuje zatwierdzonej treści rewizji jako section overrides. Najmniejszy zakres: jeden revision-bound resolver współdzielony przez capability/apply, exact binding w ActionObject i fail-close przed adapterem.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Domknięto exact revision → WordPress draft end-to-end. Immutable binding (work item, handoff, revision/content digest, package/digest, approval decision, canonical) przechodzi przez preview/review/confirm/impact/apply/audit; adapter dostaje wyłącznie zatwierdzony title i section bodies. Legacy, tamper, v2, duplicate concurrent apply i replay kończą się typed 409 przed adapterem. Claim jest atomowy z append/re-review, action_apply_started jest durable przed HTTP, outcome + apply audit + mutation audit + execution/post ID finalizują się w jednej transakcji. Crash pozostawia fail-closed claimed; local  po 300s wymaga inspekcji, dla applied robi draft readback i nigdy nie retry write. Redaction blokuje secret-like lineage. Proof: 27/27 action/audit/redaction, public exact apply 1/1, shared 38/38 (+10 skipped), dashboard typecheck, Ruff, mypy, diff-check; independent Standards+Spec re-review: no findings. Managed stack restart green, API health ok, metrics 109541/4791/8, /content-workflow HTTP 200. Publish/update/delete nadal false; real WP write nie był wykonywany.

title: Persist immutable Content Workflow revisions and bind review to exact version
description: Pilot risk: the marketer editor still lives only in React state, structured output is mutable latest-value storage, and human review is bound to a draft package rather than the exact text. A reload loses edits; an old approval can be confused with a newer text; Codex integration would have no safe state boundary.
design: Add one append-only revision module owned by WILQ API and backed by the existing ContentWorkflowStore. Server owns revision_id, monotonic revision_number, canonical digest, base_revision_id and timestamps. Persist exact title/sections/evidence plus bound draft_package/canonical context. First revision requires null base; a child requires the latest base; identical retry is idempotent; stale base returns a typed conflict without mutation. Human decisions are append-only and server-bound to revision_id+digest. Expose workspace state through the existing selected-work-item snapshot plus the smallest POST save/review endpoints. Dashboard saves/resumes exact text and handles conflicts without overwriting local edits. No Codex, ActionObject, WordPress call, vendor write, publish path or alternate persistence.
acceptance_criteria: 1. v1 then v2 remain queryable after store reopen; no update/delete path exists. 2. Server-owned digest/number/base invariants, idempotent retry, stale-base conflict and work-item isolation have focused tests. 3. approved/needs_changes/rejected/deferred reviews persist against exact revision+digest; approval of v1 never approves v2. 4. Snapshot exposes typed workspace state and moves draft/review honestly; dev_draft stays non-submit or blocked until a separate revision-bound WordPress seam. 5. Dashboard can edit, save, reload and resume the same revision; stale conflict preserves local text and gives a Polish next step. 6. Save/review proof records zero Codex, ActionObject and WordPress requests. 7. Shared/API/frontend tests, 1440/390 synthetic browser proof, current docs, Bead comment/close, deliberate commit and push pass.
close_reason: Exact content revisions persist, reload and bind human review; context drift/stale writes fail closed, and dev_draft remains blocked pending revision-bound WordPress handoff. Focused, browser and broad code proof passed.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Rozpoczęto po pushu b23e413a. Potwierdzone luki: edytor useState; save_structured_output robi mutable upsert; review wiąże draft_package_id zamiast tekstu; needs_changes/rejected/deferred nie mają pewnego append-only śladu; dry-run section_overrides nie są źródłem późniejszego apply. Granica slice: trwałe append-only revisions i exact-version human decisions, bez Codexa/ActionObjectu/WordPressa.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Domknięto append-only revision workspace: server-owned numer/base, content + full draft-package digests, idempotent save/review, stale-base/stale-review, context drift, reload/resume/conflict oraz exact-version checklist review. Stateful browser proof 1440x900 i 390x844: save -> refetch/reload -> approved exact revision -> fail-closed dev_draft; dokładnie 2 POST-y/viewport i 0 Codex/ActionObject/WordPress. Szeroki gate: 977 backend (2 skip), 36 shared, 164 dashboard, security/API/skill smokes. Pierwszy downstream run ujawnił wyłącznie 15 s timeout startu API; wait podniesiono do 40 s, potem Playwright 21/21 i dashboard build przeszły. Następny P0: revision-bound WordPress handoff; legacy review nie może autoryzować apply.

Reprodukcja przed zmianą: start timeout, chwilę później API ready i dashboard nieuruchomiony. Po zmianie local_stack restart kończy się API :8000 + dashboard :5173 ready; health ok, dashboard /content-workflow HTTP 200, metrics 109541 facts / 4791 runs / 8 connectors, queue blocked 2 candidates / 1 actionable / minimum 3. Bez vendor write.

title: Restore current marketer dashboard browser contracts
description: Full verify passes backend/shared/dashboard unit tests but Playwright reports 4 current-browser failures: Ads first screen exposes two raw act_* IDs; Content and Merchant proof expect headings no longer present; Knowledge locator ambiguously matches both Wiedza and Najbliższa wiedza do sprawdzenia. Need distinguish live UX regressions from stale browser assertions after a managed stack restart.
design: Restart the canonical managed local stack, rerun only the four failures, inspect current screen/error contexts, then fix the smallest real contract per surface. Hide raw technical IDs behind explicit technical detail; align stale locators/copy only with current marketer-facing semantics. No mock route, alternative runtime or broad redesign in this closure slice.
acceptance_criteria: Four targeted Playwright cases pass against managed API/dashboard; Ads first screen contains no raw act_/evidence IDs; current Content/Merchant/Knowledge decision surfaces remain marketer-readable; dashboard tests/build/diff pass; full verify exits 0.
close_reason: Current marketer browser contracts pass 19/19.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Completion proof: stale browser locators were aligned to active marketer surfaces, raw technical IDs remain hidden, DemandGen copy keeps typed action_ids out of marketer text, and Content demo proves a safe draft-only CTA before evidence detail. Full Playwright 19/19 and production dashboard build pass.

title: Replace Content Workflow wall with API-owned five-step journey
description: Operator risk confirmed by live code/browser review and owner feedback: ContentWorkflowSurface mounts a 655-line orchestration plus a 452-line workbench, and opening details renders nine large panels at once. React infers the active stage by parsing Polish status labels; section edits live only in useState. A marketer cannot understand or resume the content job as one journey. This slice addresses navigation/decision density only; durable workspace revisions follow separately.
design: Replace the seven technical stage wall with one API-owned five-step authoring journey: scope, section_map, draft, review, dev_draft. Each step exposes typed phase, readiness, can_open, can_submit, blocker and safe_next_step; snapshot exposes current_step_id. Dashboard renders a task map, one active step and a persistent page/service/decision summary. Completed steps may be revisited; React never derives readiness from status copy. Keep audit as an explicit technical view. No new endpoint, no Codex dependency, no vendor write, no persistence shortcut and no parallel legacy planner. Research basis: GOV.UK task-list pattern for long resumable transactions, W3C multi-page progress/current choices and USWDS high-level step indicator.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Snapshot exposes five typed marketer steps and exactly one current_step_id for ready workflow snapshots. 2. Step readiness is API-owned and no frontend includes('zablok'/'wymaga') determines navigation. 3. Marketer mode mounts a task map, persistent page/service/decision context and only one active step workspace; it does not mount the nine-panel details wall. 4. Review/dev remain draft-only and preserve ActionObject/human-review gates; no WordPress write is attempted by navigation. 5. Focused API/shared/frontend tests protect current/blocked/revisit behavior. 6. Browser proof at 1440x900 and 390x844 lets Wilku identify current step, blocker and next action in 30 seconds with no horizontal overflow. 7. docs/dashboard-state.md and PROGRESS are replaced in place, Bead comment/close, deliberate commit and push.
close_reason: Acceptance spełnione: pięciokrokowy API-owned marketer journey, focused/full proof, docs i runtime smoke; persistence pozostaje osobnym kolejnym seamem.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Zamknięty zakres navigation/decision-density. API i shared schema mają kanoniczny journey scope -> section_map -> draft -> review -> dev_draft z exact order, unique IDs, jednym current zgodnym z current_step_id oraz fail-closed prerequisites; publiczny response model waliduje ten sam invariant. Marketer mode renderuje stronę/usługę/decyzję, task mapę i jeden workspace, a dziewięć paneli technicznych dopiero po Audyt techniczny. Lokalny edytor jawnie mówi Niezapisany szkic roboczy; oba sprawdzenia bez zapisu pokazują typed success/blocker/error i zachowują mode=dry_run, write_authorization=null. Usunięto 4 bezreferencyjne duplikaty. Live proof 1440x900/390x844: .local-lab/proof/dashboard-content-workflow/2026-07-14T02-17-53-121Z/; osobny jawnie syntetyczny five-tab 390px proof: .local-lab/proof/dashboard-content-workflow/2026-07-14T02-33-15-013Z/. Zero content write requestów i zero overflow. Finalne scripts/verify.sh exit 0: 943 backend/2 skip, 158 dashboard, 34 shared/10 skip, security/API/skill smoke, 20/20 Playwright i build. Managed runtime po restarcie: health ok; live queue blocked 2 candidates/1 actionable/min 3, requires_refresh=false; snapshot current_step_id=draft, review/dev blocked. Pozostały uczciwe blockery: queue density, Service Profile review i brak immutable revision-bound draft. Następny repo-local seam to trwałe rewizje oraz exact-version human decision; bez Codexa/WordPressa w tym samym slice.

title: Prevent duplicate dev drafts from the content workbench CTA
description:
## Problem
Primary workbench może wywołać kolejne runExecutionLive mimo że activation packet potwierdza istniejący dev draft. Existing-draft update jest jawnie unsupported, więc CTA może tylko duplikować szkice albo wprowadzać operatora w błąd.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Otwórz homepage work item z draft_readback.status=available. 2. Primary canCreateEditedDevDraft ignoruje draftReadback, a sticky CTA nadal wybiera runExecutionLive, gdy istnieje writeAuthorization. 3. Dolny legacy panel ma guard hasCreatedDevDraft, którego top nie zachował.

## Current Evidence
ContentWorkflowSurface.tsx odczytuje draftReadback, ale primary CTA i canCreateEditedDevDraft nie blokują create. Live dev post 1275 istnieje, update_supported=false.

## Out of Scope
Implementacja update istniejącego draftu/ACF, publish i zmiana public canonical.

## Dependencies and Tests
Po c9h9.3. Testy: Vitest mock negative call, existing/no-existing draft cases i browser E2E.

## Done
Gdy draft istnieje, first-screen CTA otwiera istniejący szkic lub pokazuje preview-only blocker; POST live create nie jest wywoływany.
design: Wydzielić DevDraftPrimaryAction oparty wyłącznie o activation packet i existing-update readiness. Reużyć typed links/status; nie inferować możliwości update. Create pozostaje dostępne tylko bez istniejącego draftu i później przez canonical apply path.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Existing draft zmienia CTA na Otwórz istniejący szkic. 2. Execution live mutation nie jest wywołana w existing-draft state. 3. Edycje pozostają preview-only i pokazują API blocker update. 4. Create case bez draftu zachowuje typed readiness. 5. Focused Vitest, E2E i screenshot przechodzą.
notes: 2026-07-10 resolved by the stronger fail-closed slice: ContentWorkflowSurface has no runExecutionLive call or create-new-dev-draft CTA. Existing draft remains available through Otwórz podgląd na dev/Otwórz stronę dev; edits and primary CTA are preview-only and gated by API dry_run_ready/execution_blockers. Adversarial Vitest proves no direct live request; current desktop screenshot has no duplicate-create CTA. Future create-without-existing-draft behavior now belongs solely to canonical apply c9h9.4.
close_reason: Superseded by the stronger fail-closed boundary: no direct create CTA or live mutation remains; existing draft is opened/previewed and future create is owned by c9h9.4 canonical apply.

title: Remove cold-load waterfall from content workflow
description:
## Problem
Cold open /content-workflow pokazuje globalne Ładowanie stanu WILQ przez około 23 s. Operator traci prawie całe 30-sekundowe okno przed zobaczeniem decyzji.

## Current Evidence
Browser resource timings: queue 10.4 s; po queue snapshot 11.7 s, enrichment 11.8 s i activation 12.6 s; po snapshot existing-draft readiness 6.4 s. Kod czeka na queue, potem pełny snapshot, a router wielokrotnie uruchamia build_content_diagnostics.

## Out of Scope
Ogólny refaktor wszystkich diagnostics, nowy endpoint bez dowodu potrzeby i mechaniczny split całego route.

## Dependencies and Tests
Po c9h9.5 freshness, aby progressive first card miała prawdziwy stan. Powiązane r564/ho41. Testy: deferred-promise Vitest, request/build count, Playwright cold timing, desktop/mobile loading state.

## Done
Pierwsza API-owned decision card pojawia się lokalnie w maksymalnie 5 s, dolne dane ładują się lokalnie bez blank global loadera, a initial selected item nie buduje pełnego diagnostics wielokrotnie.
design: Reużyć istniejące queue/snapshot/enrichment service contracts. Najpierw renderować queue-owned decision shell i lokalne stany ładowania. Pogłębić wspólny diagnostics build/cache seam na czas jednego initial request flow zamiast dodawać kolejny endpoint. Mierzyć cold browser network trace.
acceptance_criteria: 1. First decision visible <=5 s na managed stack albo konkretny zewnętrzny blocker jest zapisany. 2. Brak globalnego blank loadera podczas snapshot/enrichment/authoring reads. 3. Najwyżej jeden pełny diagnostics build dla początkowego wybranego work itemu. 4. Subordinate panels mają lokalne loading/error states. 5. Focused API/dashboard tests, E2E timing i desktop/mobile screenshots przechodzą. 6. Brak nowej logiki biznesowej w React.
notes: 2026-07-10 stronger live proof: focused Playwright content-workflow-layout times out at 30s waiting for selected snapshot response, and the second dashboard content E2E fails on the same cold waterfall. title: Carry current freshness into content decisions and evidence
description:
## Problem
Kanoniczna content queue usuwa typed freshness z ContentDiagnosticsResponse, liczy stale sygnały jako zwykły actionable refresh i pozwala first screen pokazać zielone GSC w dowodach. Historyczne evidence z completed refresh również pozostaje oznaczone fresh mimo że connector jest stale.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Odczytaj /api/connectors i potwierdź stale GSC, WordPress i Ahrefs. 2. Odczytaj /api/content/diagnostics: freshness_assessment.state=stale i requires_refresh=true. 3. Odczytaj /api/content/work-items/queue: brak freshness/missing contracts, kandydat homepage ma refresh/plan_allowed i jest actionable. 4. Otwórz /content-workflow: GSC ma zielone w dowodach, a globalny blocker/safe refresh step nie jest above fold.

## Current Evidence
ContentWorkItemQueueResponse w wilq/content/workflow/queue.py mapuje decision_queue, ale nie diagnostics.freshness_assessment. ContentSourceStatusBar inferuje obecność connectora. wilq/evidence/registry.py mapuje historyczny completed refresh na fresh bez bieżącego age check.

## Out of Scope
Automatyczny refresh job, nowy endpoint, publikacja i przebudowa całego content UI.

## Dependencies and Tests
Powiązane z wilq-seo-4wwo, r564 i c9h9.2, ale żaden nie naprawia semantyki freshness. Testy: fresh/stale/missing/blocked; current evidence resolution; queue↔snapshot decision consistency; shared Zod; first-screen stale blocker i safe next step.

## Done
Każda content recommendation pokazuje current freshness/missing contracts i bezpieczny next step; stale primary proof nie jest traktowany jako bieżąca actionable authoring decision.
design: Rozszerzyć istniejący ContentWorkItemQueueResponse/Candidate lub współdzielony content decision view-model o reuse ContentFreshnessAssessment i typed metric/query facts. API, nie React, ustala status, blocker i safe next step. Evidence registry musi odróżniać freshness w chwili kolekcji od current/as-of freshness. Nie dodawać endpointu ani lokalnego translatora.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Queue i selected snapshot expose spójny recommended_mode/reason/freshness/blocker/safe_next_step. 2. stale/missing/blocked primary sources obniżają actionability i wymagają refresh-first. 3. Evidence ID resolution nie nazywa historycznego completed run wiecznie fresh. 4. First viewport pokazuje current source state i global queue blocker bez raw payload. 5. Regex/prose extraction nie jest źródłem decyzji. 6. Backend/shared schema/dashboard tests, live stale API proof i diff check przechodzą.
close_reason: Closed 2026-07-11: queue and selected snapshots now carry typed ContentFreshnessAssessment plus the queue candidate; stale primary GSC/public WordPress proof adds content_sources_require_refresh, changes actionability to block, preserves evidence/source lineage, and exposes refresh-first next_step above fold. Verified live HTTP queue/snapshot, 4 focused backend content test files, 31 shared schema tests, dashboard typecheck/focused Vitest, and desktop/mobile agent-browser renders.

title: Restore dev-only WordPress draft creation through canonical ActionObject apply
description:
## Problem
Po fail-closed naprawie WILQ potrzebuje jednej kanonicznej ścieżki tworzenia szkicu na dev: validate → preview → human review → confirm → audit → vendor adapter. Obecny centralny act_apply_wordpress_draft_handoff deklaruje adapter boundary, ale mutation-readiness nadal ma apply_allowed=false/api_mutation_ready=false, a jego adapter wykonuje tylko dry-run bez zatwierdzonego handoff/draft package.

## Current Evidence
/api/actions/mutation-readiness raportuje vendor_write_possible_count=0. Live write wcześniej działał poza tym mechanizmem. Adapter WordPress nie egzekwuje jawnie roli hosta dev i może użyć dowolnego skonfigurowanego base URL.

## Out of Scope
Publikacja, aktualizacja istniejącego wpisu/ACF, delete i production WordPress writes.

## Dependencies and Tests
Zależne od wilq-seo-c9h9.3. Testy muszą objąć exact action/operation/work item/handoff/draft package/target/actor binding, rejected/deferred review, dev/public/arbitrary host, mutation audit i zero HTTP dla blockerów.

## Done
Jedyną klasą vendor write jest create_wordpress_draft na zatwierdzonym dev hoście przez apply-capable ActionObject; każdy adapter attempt ma spójny ActionMutationAudit i activation packet.
design: Seam: pogłębić istniejący moduł ActionObject mutation adapter dla act_apply_wordpress_draft_handoff. Adapter dostaje typed zatwierdzony target content packet, sprawdza rolę dev hosta przed HTTP i zapisuje redacted result/audit. Content router nie odzyskuje własnej niezależnej autoryzacji. Nie dodawać endpointu ani drugiej ścieżki write.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Tylko act_apply_wordpress_draft_handoff z mode=apply, allowed_operation=create_wordpress_draft i kompletnym ActionObject audit trail może zbudować typed WordPressDraftApplyCapability i dojść do adaptera; capability wiąże exact action/work item/handoff/draft package/target/actor, zamiast ufać surowym booleansom payloadu. 2. Publiczny ekologus.pl, dowolny niezatwierdzony host i existing post update są blokowane przed HTTP. 3. Vendor attempt/result tworzy ActionMutationAudit; activation packet pokazuje prawdziwe external_write_attempted. 4. Publish/destructive pozostają false. 5. Focused action/content/API/dashboard tests, Ruff, mypy, browser proof i diff check przechodzą. 6. Live write pozostaje poza UI do czasu potwierdzenia bieżącego review/audytu i gotowości operatora.
notes:
2026-07-10 handoff from safety review: direct UI and content router live paths are removed. Canonical apply must replace raw action_apply_authorized/write_authorization_verified booleans with a typed capability created inside apply_action and bind exact apply action, work item, handoff, draft package, target host and audit actor. It must also restore any create CTA only through central apply; current UI intentionally exposes preview-only. Existing tests named after_action_apply currently model the lower boundary with manual booleans and are not proof of central apply.
2026-07-11 rebaseline: original acceptance requiring payload apply_allowed=true/api_mutation_ready=true was stale relative to the typed-capability seam. The canonical apply now derives authorization from current snapshot/review/audit and exact typed request; static payload booleans remain fail-closed and are not sufficient. Route integration proof 06cf7dfb passes with adapter reached only after capability binding.
close_reason: Canonical dev-only WordPress draft creation is implemented through typed ActionWordPressDraftApplyInput and WordPressDraftApplyCapability inside apply_action. Route integration proves exact work item/handoff/draft package/canonical URL/confirm actor binding, preview/confirm/impact audit, ActionMutationAudit and adapter reach; public/arbitrary hosts block before HTTP; publish/destructive remain false; shared dashboard contract, review-only CTA, focused tests, browser proof, Ruff/mypy and typecheck are green. Live write remains intentionally unavailable in UI when current review/audit/readiness is not present.

Connector blocks public/arbitrary hosts before HTTP. Focused action mutation, connector write, and content execution tests pass. Bead remains open: next verification must exercise the real capability builder through the route and add dashboard apply CTA only after readiness proof.
