title: Require matched 90-day evidence before negative-keyword preview
description: A reviewed practitioner source, Ebook - Optymalizacja kampanii Google Ads z AI.pdf (23 pages; SHA-256 955900fcda9bb42cc543b087f543c8d34c5e590c53149337dbfd06aca6e9682d), reinforced a concrete local contract gap: WILQ can create a negative-keyword review action from 30-day search-term facts while its payload says 90_day_safety_check. Current validation does not require a matched 90-day fact. The source is guidance only and never live Ekologus metrics.
design: Match evidence by the exact tuple search_term, campaign_id and ad_group_id. Without a matched 90-day search-term fact, return needs_90_day_review and do not emit preview/action. Action validation must require the matching search_term_90d evidence identifier. Even with proof, keep review-only posture and apply=false; no vendor write or automatic exclusion.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A 30-day-only search term cannot produce a negative-keyword preview or action and exposes needs_90_day_review. 2. A matched 90-day fact is required by the ActionObject validator for the same term/campaign/ad group. 3. With valid proof the proposal remains review-only with apply=false. 4. Focused public API and validator falsifiers cover mismatched and valid evidence without inventing Ads metrics. 5. State record, Bead and deliberate publication are updated.
close_reason: Exact 90-day safety evidence now gates negative-keyword preview and review ActionObject; focused API/validator/live/browser proof passed.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Implemented exact 90-day evidence gate. A 30-day-only candidate remains needs_90_day_review with payload_preview=null, no contract preview and no action ID. Action construction now requires a search_term_90d_* fact in the same search_term/campaign_id/ad_group_id group; typed preview carries safety_evidence_ids and validation requires those IDs inside the row evidence set. Exact mismatched campaign proof returns no action. Valid proof remains prepare-only/apply=false. Evidence: focused public API + validator + existing live Ads contract 3/3; action validation 18/18; shared schemas 37/37; Ruff, mypy, dashboard typecheck; managed restart live summary 5 candidates/5 matched previews/all apply=false; /ads-doctor browser heading 1.432s with no raw IDs above fold. Updated docs/PROGRESS.md and docs/dashboard-state.md. No vendor mutation or invented Ads metrics.

design: Use an explicit import seam that works both for direct deterministic smoke execution and importlib test loading, without adding a fallback runtime or changing Localo diagnostics/refresh behavior. Keep the focused test proving diagnostics are read without refresh by default.
acceptance_criteria: Localo smoke imports under direct CLI and importlib; focused Localo tests pass; deterministic Localo smoke passes against local API; full verify passes.

title: Prevent staggered daily-check cache expiry latency spikes
description: Operator risk: managed-restart readiness is now honest and fast, but controlled idle/expiry proof on 2026-07-13 showed staggered cold dependency rebuilds: after 31 seconds a daily-check read took 12.973748s, then 4.546343s, 2.714065s and warm hits around 0.015s. A copied-store profile isolates direct command-center at 3.888417s, GA4 cold at 4.618954s and content cold at 4.355917s. Independent 30s/60s caches can therefore make one operator request pay cumulative internal rebuild cost even though source state did not change.
design: Do not add a second endpoint, fake data, stale-success claim or vendor refresh. First reproduce cache-age ordering deterministically and identify the smallest existing cache/invalidation/lifespan coordination that keeps operator reads under the documented budget or returns the existing typed prewarm blocker while proof is unavailable. Preserve explicit invalidation after connector/action/job changes and retain source freshness in the payload. Do not merely raise TTLs without a freshness argument.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Deterministic proof identifies which daily runtime, GA4 and content cache ages combine into the spike. 2. Three operator reads across the relevant expiry boundary stay under 5s or an honest typed in-progress blocker returns quickly. 3. Status, freshness, evidence IDs, source connectors, blocked claims, safe next actions and ActionObject no-write posture remain unchanged. 4. Focused tests cover the concrete expiry/invalidation/concurrency regression; Ruff, mypy, API smoke, browser proof and diff check pass. 5. No new endpoint, vendor write, automatic refresh, fake data or React business logic.
close_reason: Expired daily-check dependencies now return an immediate typed prewarm blocker and rebuild once in background; full proof remains unchanged and under budget.

title: Cache GA4 diagnostics used by daily-check
description: Operator risk: daily-check rebuilds the expensive GA4 diagnostics contract on each cache miss, and the standalone GA4 endpoint also repeats metric-fact/tactical reads. Scope: add a typed cached builder at the existing GA4 briefing boundary, use it from the GA4 router and daily-check guard, invalidate it through clear_api_view_model_caches after connector/action/job refreshes, preserve response fields, freshness/evidence and no-write semantics. Out of scope: new endpoint, metric selection changes, vendor writes, React, stale-data claims, fake prewarm data.
design: Follow existing content/merchant/Ads cache patterns with monotonic TTL and explicit invalidation. Keep build_ga4_diagnostics as the uncached seam for tests and direct composition; cached builder is an adapter only. Do not cache across refresh invalidation or alter GA4 contract semantics.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Focused cache tests prove hit, expiry and invalidation. 2. Router and daily-check use the cached builder. 3. API response is field/semantic parity for live, blocked and missing fixtures. 4. Evidence IDs, source connectors, freshness and blocked conversion/ROAS claims are unchanged. 5. Ruff, mypy, focused GA4/daily-check contracts, API smoke, browser proof and git diff check pass. 6. Live timing records before/after and no vendor writes.
notes: Discovered from wilq-seo-inoz cold-start measurements; choose this seam only after live HTTP timing confirmed repeated GA4 build cost.
close_reason: GA4 cache hit, TTL expiry, explicit invalidation and concurrent cold-build contracts pass; same-process live refresh proves clear/rebuild/hit without mutation writes, and browser/readiness proof is recorded.

title: Eliminate cold first daily-check race after readiness
description:
Operator risk: after managed API restart, /api/health becomes ready before the background daily-runtime prewarm has completed; the first GET /api/marketing/daily-check can still take 7-13 seconds. Current proof 2026-07-13: after restart first read 7.972941s, then 2.129635s and 1.955084s; an earlier cold run recorded 13.038038s. Bead 0hdm correctly proves post-prewarm reads under 5s, but does not prove the first operator request after readiness.

## Context
Seam: apps/api/wilq_api/main.py wilq/briefing/daily_runtime.py and existing /api/marketing/daily-check router. Out of scope: content queue density, knowledge approval, UAT, dashboard redesign. Priority P1; estimate 120 minutes.
design: Extend the existing wilq_lifespan/daily_runtime prewarm seam without adding an endpoint or fake data. Choose an explicit readiness/prewarm coordination strategy that preserves health responsiveness, avoids duplicate concurrent builds and keeps refresh invalidation safe. The API must either make the first daily-check read fast after readiness or expose an honest typed in-progress blocker/next step; do not hide latency by changing metrics or claims.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Reproduce and record cold first-read timing after managed restart. 2. Implement the smallest existing-cache/lifespan coordination that removes or honestly surfaces the race. 3. Three consecutive post-readiness daily-check reads meet a documented budget or a typed external-state blocker explains why not. 4. status, freshness, evidence IDs, source connectors, safe next actions and ActionObject safety remain identical. 5. Tests cover concurrent/prewarm lifecycle and invalidation; Ruff, mypy, API smoke, browser proof, diff check and handoff pass. 6. No new endpoint, vendor write, refresh behavior or React business logic.
close_reason: Readiness race, action parity, concurrency and invalidation criteria proven.

title: Make dashboard usefulness readiness honor API blockers
description:
Operator risk: dashboard_usefulness_audit.py currently labels production surfaces demo_ready when structural evidence/decisions exist even though API-owned readiness is blocked or review-required. Live proof 2026-07-13: Service Profile reports production_depth_readiness.ready_for_daily_content=false with 0 approved production-depth cards, while the audit reports demo_ready score 10; daily-check is status=blocked and content queue is blocked at 1 actionable of 3. This can make Wilku believe a surface is production-ready when WILQ itself says review or blocker.

## Context
Zakres poza zadaniem: zmiana API readiness, dashboard copy redesign, content queue density, knowledge-card approval, vendor writes. Seam: scripts/dashboard_usefulness_audit.py evaluate_surface/_readiness plus focused behavior tests. Required tests: new focused audit tests, Ruff, mypy if applicable, live API audit and git diff check. Priority P1; estimate 90 minutes.
design: Extend the existing dashboard usefulness audit seam, not dashboard routes or API semantics. Derive a semantic readiness override from typed API fields: explicit blocked/queue_status=blocked becomes blocked; production_depth_readiness.ready_for_daily_content=false or explicit review_required becomes review_ready. Keep structural usefulness score and evidence checks separate, preserve Polish output, and never infer readiness from raw metric values.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Live Service Profile with production_depth_readiness.ready_for_daily_content=false is never demo_ready. 2. Explicit API status/queue_status blocked is reported as blocked. 3. Structurally healthy ready surfaces can remain demo_ready. 4. Focused tests cover blocked, review-required and ready payloads plus score/pass semantics. 5. Live audit shows no production surface falsely demo_ready when typed API readiness is blocked/review-required. 6. No API/dashboard route or business rule changes.
close_reason: API-owned readiness now overrides misleading demo_ready labels; focused tests, live audit, Ruff, mypy and diff check pass.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Implementation proof 2026-07-13: evaluate_surface now honors semantic API readiness separately from structural usefulness score. Explicit status/queue_status=blocked yields blocked; production_depth_readiness.ready_for_daily_content=false or review_required yields review_ready; ready surfaces remain demo_ready. New focused tests cover blocked/review/ready fixtures. Ruff, mypy, git diff check and live dashboard_usefulness_audit pass: 11 demo-ready, 2 review-ready, 1 blocked, production pass=true. No API/dashboard route changes.

title: Align skill smoke test with route-owned API contracts
description: Problem: tests/test_codex_skill_eval_cases.py::test_route_specific_skill_smokes_expose_marketing_brief_items fails because several route skills intentionally use API-owned diagnostics or context-pack output instead of a literal brief request. The current assertion encodes an old implementation string and blocks the focused suite without proving operator behavior.
design: Keep the test behavior-focused. For each route skill, require its SKILL.md to allow the canonical brief/context surface and require the smoke to expose either brief_items from /api/marketing/brief or the route-specific typed diagnostic projection (for example ads_diagnostics/content_diagnostics). Do not add duplicate API calls or change skill product behavior.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Focused test passes against all route skill smoke scripts. 2. The test fails if a route smoke exposes neither brief evidence nor its typed route diagnostic. 3. No exact stale local variable name is required where the contract is equivalent. 4. Full targeted skill-contract and strict coverage checks remain green. 5. Docs/Beads record the current behavior and stale assertion is not reintroduced.
notes: Current evidence: 2026-07-13 focused pytest failure at tests/test_codex_skill_eval_cases.py:806; route smoke inventory shows wilq-ads-doctor and wilq-gsc-content-doctor expose typed diagnostics, while content-strategist consumes context-pack. No active Bead covers this exact stale assertion.
close_reason: Updated route smoke contract test to assert typed API/context surfaces instead of stale implementation strings; focused pytest, Ruff, strict coverage and diff checks pass.

title: Define typed contracts for low-volume and source-conflict guards
description: Problem operatora / ryzyko: v9ab.8 acceptance names low_volume and source_conflict guards, but current DailyCheck/MetricFact contracts expose no typed sample-size threshold, comparable baseline or source-conflict join. Heuristic guard would invent certainty; absence of a guard leaves these conclusions untestable. Aktualny dowód: 2026-07-13 audit wilq/briefing/false_positive_guards.py and schemas has source-trace, conversion, date-window, multi-source and measurement-baseline contracts, but no typed low-volume/source-conflict input; v9ab.8 comments explicitly defer both.
design: First define the smallest API-owned typed evidence contract for one bounded use case: explicit sample-size/threshold lineage and explicit conflicting source identities/values with evidence IDs. Do not add heuristics, new endpoint, vendor writes or React logic. Then wire a guard and DailyCheck output only after the contract is reviewed and deterministic fixtures exist.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Contract names the compared metric/window/threshold or conflicting source values, evidence IDs and safe next step. 2. Missing contract blocks instead of guessing. 3. Complete typed input can pass a bounded guard with Polish explanation. 4. DailyCheckResult and focused tests prove the behavior. 5. No unsupported low-volume/source-conflict claim appears in live output without proof.
notes: Split out of v9ab.8 after supported guard set became complete; this is a design/contract prerequisite, not permission to invent thresholds.
close_reason: Typed MetricSampleEvidence and SourceComparisonEvidence contracts, fail-closed low_volume/source_conflict guards, DailyDecision to DailyCheckItem lineage wiring, missing-contract blockers, focused 27 tests, Ruff/mypy/complexity, live DailyCheck/API and content-workflow Playwright proof are complete. Current expert rules do not require these optional contracts, so existing decisions are not artificially blocked; unsupported conclusions remain blocked whenever the contract is invoked.

Focused tests 26 passed, Ruff/mypy/complexity/diff pass. Focused 27 tests, Ruff, mypy, complexity, API daily-check (blocked/fresh/9 checked/1 blocked/3 safe), dashboard HTTP 200 and Playwright content-workflow 1/1 pass. Remaining: tie explicit expert-rule false_positive_checks to required contracts; no heuristic added.

title: Split giant Ads vendor-read contract test into behavior modules
description:
## Problem
Aktualny complexity audit pokazuje tests/api_contracts/test_ads_contracts.py jako 4998 LOC, a test_ads_diagnostics_exposes_live_campaign_metric_facts zajmuje 2919 linii i 29 branchy. Taki test miesza fixture, vendor-read routing, metric assertions, evidence freshness i operator labels; utrudnia diagnozę regresji i daje słaby feedback z pełnej bramki.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-13 audit_complexity: test_ads_contracts.py 4998 non-empty LOC; test_ads_diagnostics_exposes_live_campaign_metric_facts 2919 lines/29 branches. No active Bead covers this exact current function; prior 50wa.6 is closed and historical.

## Out of Scope
Nie zmieniać runtime Ads API, rankingów, ActionObject safety, OAuth, vendor credentials ani treści operatora. Nie zmieniać asercji tylko po to, by obniżyć wynik complexity.

## Proposed Seam
Rozdzielić fixture/read-contract setup od behavior assertions w domain test modules; zachować wspólny typed fixture helper i osobne testy dla campaign metrics, search terms/recommendations, evidence freshness i blocked claims.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_ads_contracts.py przestaje zawierać 2919-liniowy test; każdy nowy moduł ma nazwane behavior tests.
2. Wszystkie obecne Ads contract assertions pozostają zachowane semantycznie, bez osłabiania evidence/source/action safety.
3. Focused Ads contract tests, full backend tests for touched modules, Ruff, mypy i complexity audit przechodzą.
4. Nowy seam nie wprowadza import cycles ani zmiany API response.
5. Handoff opisuje mapę przeniesionych zachowań i kryterium przejścia do kolejnego modułu.

## Dependencies
Zależne od zamkniętego dashboard cleanup i aktualnego WILQ API; równoległy connector state nie jest warunkiem.

## Required Tests
Focused tests/api_contracts/test_ads_contracts.py i nowych modułów, backend pytest dla Ads contracts, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity i diff check.

## Completion
Brak test function powyżej lokalnego budżetu 100 linii lub jawne uzasadnienie dla pozostałej granicy, przy zachowaniu wszystkich kontraktów i zielonych bramek.
design: Najpierw wyznaczyć naturalne granice po endpointach i typowanych kontraktach. Wspólne fixture helpers mają być małe i jawne; nie przenosić product logic do test helperów. Preferować test behavior over route-string snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: No 2919-line Ads contract test; behavior modules preserve all assertions; focused/backend Ads tests, Ruff, mypy, complexity and diff check green.
close_reason: Closed after 53 behavior seams and explicit integration-boundary justification: all domain assertions are named helpers; remaining 945-line function orchestrates one isolated refresh-to-context-pack evidence journey. Ads/API tests, Ruff, mypy, diff check and complexity audit pass.

title: Stabilize parallel dashboard Vitest gate after fixture extraction
description:
## Problem
Po rozbiciu fixture route tests pełna równoległa bramka dashboardu nadal kończy się timeoutami ciężkich testów Merchant/App i ContentWorkflow, mimo że serialny pełny run jest zielony. To utrudnia wiarygodny feedback CI i może maskować realne regresje.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-13 default Vitest run: 42/44 files passed, 162/164 tests passed; failures are App.test.tsx merchant waitFor timeout and ContentWorkflowSurface.test.tsx 10s timeout. Serial : 44/44 files, 164/164 tests (after current fixture slices). Focused Merchant/ContentWorkflow runs pass.

## Out of Scope
Nie zmieniać API/view-modelu, nie podnosić timeoutów bez pomiaru, nie usuwać behavior proof i nie oznaczać serialnego runu jako substytutu stabilnej równoległości.

## Proposed Seam
Vitest/dashboard test harness: isolate shared fetch/query globals, reduce cross-file resource contention and make heavy route fixtures deterministic. Zachować osobne domain behavior tests i API-owned contracts.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Domyślna równoległa komenda 
> @wilq/dashboard@0.1.0 test /home/krn/coding/krn/active/wilq-seo/apps/dashboard
> vitest run -- --reporter=dot


 RUN  v4.1.9 /home/krn/coding/krn/active/wilq-seo/apps/dashboard

 ❯ src/routes/App.test.tsx (6 tests | 1 failed) 12489ms
     × merchant route renders dedicated product-file diagnostics 5745ms
 ❯ src/routes/ContentWorkflowSurface.test.tsx (16 tests | 1 failed) 24719ms
     × renders the ordered content production workflow without raw technical terms 13346ms

 Test Files  2 failed | 42 passed (44)
      Tests  2 failed | 162 passed (164)
   Start at  09:07:54
   Duration  34.07s (transform 24.84s, setup 12.73s, import 96.21s, tests 98.17s, environment 146.96s)

 ELIFECYCLE  Test failed. See above for more details. przechodzi bez timeoutów przez 2 kolejne uruchomienia.
2. Serialny pełny gate pozostaje zielony i nie jest jedynym dowodem.
3. Merchant/App i ContentWorkflow focused behavior tests przechodzą bez zwiększania globalnego timeoutu.
4. Brak zmian w API, write safety i marketer-facing semantics.
5. Przyczyna contention/isolation jest opisana w teście lub konfiguracji, a , typecheck i lint przechodzą.

## Dependencies
Zależne od aktualnych fixture seamów ; nie blokuje produkcyjnego API.

## Required Tests
Dwa pełne równoległe runy, serialny pełny run, Merchant/App + ContentWorkflow focused, typecheck, lint, diff check.

## Completion
Zielona równoległa bramka przez dwa runy, bez obniżenia zakresu testów i bez nieopisanego timeoutu.
design: Seam wyłącznie w dashboardowym harnessie Vitest: test isolation, controlled concurrency lub deterministyczne fixtures; najpierw zmierzyć contention, potem najmniejsza zmiana. Nie przenosić logiki biznesowej do testów.
acceptance_criteria: Default parallel dashboard run passes twice; serial full run remains green; focused Merchant/App and ContentWorkflow pass; no global timeout theater; typecheck/lint/diff check green.
close_reason: Redundant duplicate of completed c9h9.20; no new scope or evidence.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Redundant duplicate of wilq-seo-c9h9.20. The same parallel Vitest contention was measured and resolved by test.maxWorkers=2; see closed c9h9.20 and commit 9ba183a8/4a494702.

title: Stabilize parallel dashboard Vitest gate after fixture extraction
description:
## Problem
Po rozbiciu fixture route tests pelna rownolegla bramka dashboardu nadal konczy sie timeoutami ciezkich testow Merchant/App i ContentWorkflow, mimo ze serialny pelny run jest zielony. To utrudnia wiarygodny feedback CI i moze maskowac realne regresje.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-13 default Vitest run: 42/44 files passed, 162/164 tests passed; failures are App.test.tsx merchant waitFor timeout and ContentWorkflowSurface.test.tsx 10s timeout. Serial maxWorkers=1: 44/44 files, 164/164 tests after current fixture slices. Focused Merchant/ContentWorkflow runs pass.

## Out of Scope
Nie zmieniac API/view-modelu, nie podnosic timeoutow bez pomiaru, nie usuwac behavior proof i nie oznaczac serialnego runu jako substytutu stabilnej rownoleglosci.

## Proposed Seam
Vitest/dashboard test harness: isolate shared fetch/query globals, reduce cross-file resource contention and make heavy route fixtures deterministic. Zachowac osobne domain behavior tests i API-owned contracts.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Domyslna rownolegla komenda pnpm dashboard test przechodzi bez timeoutow przez 2 kolejne uruchomienia.
2. Serialny pelny gate pozostaje zielony i nie jest jedynym dowodem.
3. Merchant/App i ContentWorkflow focused behavior tests przechodza bez zwiekszania globalnego timeoutu.
4. Brak zmian w API, write safety i marketer-facing semantics.
5. Przyczyna contention/isolation jest opisana w tescie lub konfiguracji, a diff-check, typecheck i lint przechodza.

## Dependencies
Zalezne od aktualnych fixture seamow pidl; nie blokuje produkcyjnego API.

## Required Tests
Dwa pelne rownolegle runy, serialny pelny run, Merchant/App + ContentWorkflow focused, typecheck, lint, diff check.

## Completion
Zielona rownolegla bramka przez dwa runy, bez obnizenia zakresu testow i bez nieopisanego timeoutu.
design: Seam wylacznie w dashboardowym harnessie Vitest: test isolation, controlled concurrency lub deterministyczne fixtures; najpierw zmierzyc contention, potem najmniejsza zmiana. Nie przenosic logiki biznesowej do testow.
acceptance_criteria: Default parallel dashboard run passes twice; serial full run remains green; focused Merchant/App and ContentWorkflow pass; no global timeout theater; typecheck/lint/diff check green.
close_reason: Configured measured Vitest concurrency limit and verified required parallel/serial/focused gates; timeout instability resolved without timeout theater.

Serial post-change run 44/44 and 164/164; Merchant/App + ContentWorkflow focused 22/22; typecheck/lint/diff check green. No global timeout increase.

title: Remove duplicate Ahrefs candidate keys from dashboard test fixtures
description:
## Problem
App.test.tsx emits React duplicate-key warnings for the same Ahrefs candidate ID, weakening browser/test proof and potentially hiding duplicate rendering defects.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run the focused dashboard App test. 2. Observe the repeated React warning for key ahrefs_candidate_audyt_srodowiskowy. 3. Inspect the fixture definitions at lines 5474 and 6435.

## Current Evidence
Focused App.test.tsx run on 2026-07-13 passes 30 tests but logs repeated duplicate-key warnings; the fixture defines that ID twice.

## Out of Scope
No Ahrefs ranking/business logic changes, no API contract changes, no suppression of React warnings.

## Dependencies and Tests
May follow wilq-seo-pidl settings extraction. Add a focused fixture/route test proving candidate keys are unique and rerun App/Ahrefs dashboard tests.

## Done
The focused dashboard suite passes without duplicate-key warnings and candidate identity remains deterministic.
design: Normalize the test fixture at its source: assign stable unique IDs to distinct Ahrefs candidate rows or deduplicate only when the API contract says rows are identical. Do not patch React with array indexes or silence console.error.
acceptance_criteria: 1. No duplicate React key warning in App/Ahrefs focused tests. 2. Candidate rows retain deterministic identity. 3. Dashboard typecheck/lint and focused tests pass. 4. No production/API behavior changes.
notes: Confirmed runtime/test warning; no existing Bead found for this exact fixture defect.
close_reason: Adversarial Ahrefs fixture no longer reuses identical candidate IDs; deterministic suffixed IDs remove duplicate React key warnings. App/Ahrefs focused 26/26, dashboard typecheck/lint and diff check pass; no production/API change.

title: Restore live content marketer review card contract
description:
Problem operatora: live GET /api/content/diagnostics ma decyzje GSC/WordPress i akcję act_prepare_content_refresh_queue, ale marketer_decision nie zwraca review_card_label, review_decision_after_review, review_question_for_wilku, review_next_safe_click ani review_action_ids. GSC skill smoke zatrzymuje się na brakującym kontrakcie, więc marketer nie dostaje jawnej karty review i bezpiecznego kliknięcia.

## Context
Aktualny dowód 2026-07-13: API health ok; 104362 metric facts / 4580 refresh runs; content queue fresh, 2 kandydatów, 1 actionable; GET /api/content/diagnostics live_data_available=true, action_ids zawiera act_prepare_content_refresh_queue, marketer_decision fields są null, decision_queue ma content_decision_https___www_ekologus_pl z tym action ID. GSC smoke po wspólnym harnessie kończy się: Wilku review card must point only to content refresh review action.
design: Rozszerzyć istniejący API-owned content diagnostics view-model/builder o typed marketer_decision review card. Nie składać copy w skillu ani React; zachować evidence/source connectors/freshness, wskazać wyłącznie istniejącą akcję content refresh dla decyzji GSC/WordPress, a Ahrefs-only blocker pozostawić bez akcji. Nie dodawać endpointu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Live content diagnostics dla decyzji z GSC/WordPress zwraca niepuste review_card_label, review_decision_after_review, review_question_for_wilku i review_next_safe_click po polsku. 2. review_next_safe_click jawnie blokuje publikację, a review_action_ids == [act_prepare_content_refresh_queue] tylko gdy ta akcja występuje. 3. Ahrefs-only blocker nie dostaje zmyślonej akcji. 4. Context-pack zachowuje ten sam scoped contract. 5. GSC smoke, content API contract tests, Ruff, mypy i live HTTP proof przechodzą; brak metryk/claimów bez evidence IDs/source connectors.
close_reason: Current API contract is already implemented and live proof passes after managed restart; the observed failure was a stale smoke assertion comparing global action IDs instead of the selected technical decision. Smoke assertion corrected in the shared harness slice.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-13 re-audit: after managed stack restart, live GET /api/content/diagnostics returns marketer_decision with review card, Polish safe next click and selected-decision action IDs. Initial null was cold/prewarm read artifact. No product gap remains; GSC smoke assertion was stale because it compared selected card to global action_ids.

title: Project typed Service Profile context into each content work-item snapshot
description:
## Problem operatora lub ryzyko

Marketer ma w jednym work itemie publiczną stronę, evidence, Claim Ledger, brief, szkic, human review i plan pomiaru, lecz musi przejść do osobnej trasy Service Profile, aby sprawdzić, czy dana usługa i polityka twierdzeń są w ogóle gotowe. To rozdziela decyzję od podstawy claimów i pozwala odczytać ogólny Claim Ledger jak pełne dopasowanie do usługi.

## Aktualny dowód

`ContentWorkItemWorkflowSnapshotResponse` w `wilq/content/workflow/contracts.py` zawiera claim_ledger, preflight, sales_brief, draft_package, human_review i measurement_window, ale nie ma typed `service_profile` ani per-work-item bindingu. `contentWorkflowRuntime.ts` ładuje wyłącznie ten snapshot. Live `GET /api/content/work-items/{homepage}/snapshot` ma 4 wpisy ledger, preflight `plan_allowed`, brief, draft package i measurement window, lecz nie ma pola Service Profile. `GET /api/content/service-profile` jest osobnym read-only route z approval status `blocked`. Desktop 1440x900 `/content-workflow` pokazuje public/dev/current-proposed workflow, lecz nie wskazuje konkretnej usługi ani jej approval/claim policy. Search Beads nie znalazł aktywnego taska o tym samym per-work-item scope.

## Poza zakresem

Nowy endpoint, zmiana reguł Service Profile, nowe progi/ranking tematów, automatyczne dopasowanie usługi z promptu, write/publish/vendor adapter, Workspace Dossier, broad redesign dashboardu oraz odblokowanie istniejących blokad claimów.

## Zależności

Parent `wilq-seo-r564`; istniejące `ContentWorkItemWorkflowSnapshotResponse`, read-only Service Profile i Claim Ledger. Niezależne od `r564.5` Ahrefs overlap oraz `v9ab.11` Workspace Dossier.
design:
## Proponowany seam / API

Rozszerz istniejący snapshot work itemu oraz jego istniejący frontendowy typed boundary, bez nowego route. Dodaj kompaktowy API-owned per-work-item Service Profile decision context: identyfikator/etykieta usługi tylko gdy istnieje typed binding, status approval/readiness, allowed/review-required/blocked claim policy, source/evidence/freshness, missing contracts i jeden safe next step. Brak typed bindingu albo niegotowy profil ma być jawnym blockerem, nie wnioskowaniem z `service_fit: str`. Dashboard tylko renderuje ten view-model: jedna zwięzła sekcja przy decyzji/Claim Ledger, szczegóły techniczne w disclosure. Zachowaj public `ekologus.pl` vs dev workspace, ActionObject flow oraz write/publish=false.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Existing selected work-item snapshot returns a typed compact Service Profile decision context with source connectors, evidence IDs, freshness, missing contracts and safe next step; no new endpoint.
2. Context never promotes a service from free-text `service_fit`: absent/unbound/blocked profile is an explicit blocker.
3. Content Workflow shows marketer-readable service decision and claim policy alongside the existing work item/Claim Ledger without card spam; technical IDs stay in disclosure.
4. Allowed, review-required and blocked claims remain consistent with the existing Service Profile; public/dev roles and all write/publish/destructive gates remain unchanged.
5. Focused schema/API tests, frontend typed/Vitest test, API live proof and desktop/mobile browser screenshot prove the behavior and the 30-second operator decision.
6. Completion is a current usefulness note explaining what service/claim decision the marketer can now make from one work item.
close_reason: Typed Service Profile context is live in the existing content work-item snapshot, evidence-first and review-blocked; tests and desktop/mobile proof confirm the marketer decision without unsafe inference or write changes.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 completion proof: existing work-item snapshot now projects a compact typed Service Profile context from the already matched knowledge card, with binding, review status, source/evidence lineage, actual source freshness date, missing contracts and safe next step. No endpoint, free-text service_fit inference, vendor write or publish path was added; blocked snapshots return not_evaluated. Claim counts are explicitly scoped to the selected service card and concrete claims are inside disclosure, while the full Claim Ledger remains separate. Live homepage: bound ekologus_service_homepage_overview, blocked, public_site, ev_content_service_profile_source_facts, freshness 2026-07-02, publish false; blocked Ahrefs item stays not_evaluated. Focused backend/API/shared-schema/dashboard tests, Ruff, mypy, dashboard lint/build, diff check, Fallow changed-file gate and browser proof pass. Independent re-review after two P2 fixes found no P0/P1/P2. Desktop 1440x900 and mobile 390x844 proof are under .local-lab/proof/r5646-service-profile; mobile root scroll width equals 390. Historical stale-only Content Workflow Playwright assertion remains separately tracked in d380; it was not masked by reverting product state. Complexity API monolith follow-up created as c9h9.16.

title: Block daily content queue without an evidence-backed measurement baseline
description: Problem operatora lub ryzyko: daily content queue może kierować do review, gdy żaden actionable temat nie ma dowodowej typed ContentOpportunityMeasurementBaseline. Sam ContentWorkItemQueueCandidate.measurement_readiness oznacza wyłącznie możliwość zaplanowania pomiaru po publicznym canonical i nie wystarcza jako baseline. Aktualny dowód: build_content_opportunity_enrichment tworzy ContentOpportunityMeasurementBaseline tylko z metrykami GSC/GA4/Ahrefs, measurement connectorami i evidence IDs; wilq/briefing/daily_check.py nie konsumuje dziś tego kontraktu. Live homepage jest actionable i ma ready_to_plan baseline z metrykami/evidence, a zablokowany Ahrefs candidate nie może go zastąpić. Poza zakresem: nowe metryki, progi low-volume, automatyczna ocena efektu, vendor writes, nowe endpointy/schemy i zmiana progu liczby kandydatów. Zależności: wymaga daily-check v0 oraz existing content queue/preflight/enrichment; jest niezależne od multi-source proof, ale oba zamykają różne false positives.
design: Użyj istniejącego ContentWorkItemQueueResponse wyłącznie do actionable filter oraz istniejącego build_content_opportunity_enrichment do typed baseline. Dla aggregate daily content queue mapuj actionable candidates do decyzji diagnostics; baseline przechodzi tylko przy ready_to_plan oraz niepustych evidence IDs i source connectors. Brak pary, wyjątek lub zero qualifying candidates daje missing_measurement_baseline fail-closed z polskim next step. Nie promuj blocked Ahrefs candidate, nie używaj queue_status ani minimum 3 jako baseline gate, nie dodawaj reguł w React ani write path. Zachowaj aktualny queue density blocker jako niezależny stan, nie jako dowód baseline.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Brak actionable kandydata z evidence-backed ContentOpportunityMeasurementBaseline ready_to_plan daje daily blocked_recommendation z guardem missing_measurement_baseline i konkretnym Polish next step. 2. Jeden actionable baseline-ready zachowuje review_required, nawet gdy queue globalnie jest blocked przez density albo inne candidate są blocked. 3. Candidate z publicznym URL, ale baseline bez metryk/evidence/connectors, nie przechodzi. 4. Evidence IDs, source connectors, freshness, source_trace, multi-source i date_window są zachowane; blocked Ahrefs candidate nie jest promowany jako baseline. 5. Focused tests obejmują ready, brak readiness, public-URL-only false positive, exception/mismatch i HTTP daily-check. 6. Live proof po restarcie pokazuje status zgodny z aktualną kolejką; brak endpointu, schema, React business rule i write path.
close_reason: Implemented and verified evidence-backed content measurement baseline guard with independent, fail-closed queue-density disclosure; proof recorded in handoff and current docs.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Zamknięte po finalnym review: aggregate daily content queue korzysta z istniejącego enrichment-backed ContentOpportunityMeasurementBaseline. Brak metryk/connectors/evidence, mismatch lub wyjątek daje missing_measurement_baseline fail-closed; blocked Ahrefs nie jest promowany. Queue density pozostaje niezależna: przy pass widać review jednego tematu i 1 z 3, przy dowolnym blockerze widoczna jest neutralnie bez fałszywego CTA. Focused contracts, Ruff, mypy, complexity, diff check i live HTTP po managed restart są green; brak endpointu, React business rule i vendor write.

title: Strengthen Ahrefs cross-source overlap before marking demand or inventory present
description: Problem operatora lub ryzyko: Ahrefs candidate może dostać etykietę potwierdzonego popytu GSC albo istniejącego inventory WordPress wyłącznie przez luźny wspólny token, mimo braku referenced_public_url i braku semantycznego dopasowania. To zawyża pewność marketera, choć obecna kolejka poprawnie pozostaje fail-closed. Aktualny dowód: wilq/content/planning/ahrefs.py ustawia gsc_demand i wordpress_inventory_match na present przy dowolnym _matching_content_signal_labels; live review row bez referenced_public_url połączył niepowiązane GSC i WordPress sygnały przez wspólny token. Brak otwartego Beada o tym zakresie potwierdzony przez bd search. Poza zakresem: zmiana progu candidate density, automatyczne tworzenie tematów, publikacja, zmiana danych Ahrefs/GSC/WordPress i obietnice SEO. Zależności: wymaga istniejącego content inventory oraz pozostaje osobne od v9ab.8 daily guard.
design: Rozszerz istniejący typed ContentAhrefsCandidateRow/AhrefsGapFactScore zamiast budować nowy endpoint lub regułę w React. Wprowadź API-owned strength/status dla cross-source overlap (np. exact, weak, review_required) oparty o istniejące URL/query/inventory lineage; weak token-only overlap nie może wystawiać etykiety present ani podbijać relevance jak potwierdzenie. Zachowaj fail-closed canonical/duplicate gates oraz pokaż operatorowi, co wymaga ręcznej weryfikacji.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Token-only overlap bez referenced_public_url albo równoważnej typed lineage jest oznaczony weak/review i nie zwraca etykiety potwierdzonego GSC/WordPress. 2. Potwierdzony exact overlap zachowuje evidence IDs, source connectors i czytelny Polish label. 3. Relevance score nie dostaje punktów jak za potwierdzenie z weak overlap. 4. Existing canonical/duplicate gates i public/dev URL roles pozostają fail-closed. 5. Focused fixtures pokrywają token-only false positive, exact overlap i brak publicznego URL; odpowiednie API/content queue tests przechodzą. 6. Live read po restarcie nie przedstawia weak overlap jako pewnego potwierdzenia.
close_reason: Exact-only typed cross-source proof now blocks token-only and dev-workspace false positives; runtime, tests and browser proof confirm manual-only state.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 scope re-audit: the same token-only false positive is duplicated in wilq/briefing/tactical_queue.py, where weak overlap becomes dimensions gsc_demand/wordpress_inventory_match=present and action-adjacent confirmation copy. Live Ahrefs diagnostics has 6 cross-check candidates without referenced public URL yet marks GSC/WP present. This slice must use one shared typed pure overlap module for planning and tactical queue, make weak-only cross-check manual_required/no content handoff, and keep only exact lineage in preflight similar URLs.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 completion proof: added shared typed pure Ahrefs cross-source matcher used by planning and tactical queue. Only exact public phrase/URL lineage can mark GSC demand or WordPress inventory present, change score, expose queue action or feed duplicate preflight; weak similarity stays manual-only with source/evidence lineage. WordPress records without a public URL, including same-title dev Proudsite drafts, are discarded before phrase matching. Live after managed restart: API ok, 104362 metric facts, 4580 refresh runs, Ahrefs manual_required with 6 candidates, 0 exact GSC/WordPress matches and 0 action IDs; 10 tactical items backed by Ahrefs have 0 actions. Focused pytest 20 passed; Ruff/mypy, shared schema test, dashboard Vitest/lint/build, API skill smoke and desktop/mobile screenshots pass. Independent review found the dev-title route, fixed and rechecked; no remaining P0/P1/P2. Complexity reports 11 pre-existing oversized touched files/functions, while the new matcher/test stay within budget.

title: Block daily content decisions missing ExpertRule-required sources
description: Problem operatora lub ryzyko: aggregate daily content queue może wyglądać na review-ready mimo że jeden z konektorów wymaganych przez obowiązującą regułę WordPress nie ma własnego typed MetricFact z evidence. Sama deklarowana nazwa źródła nie jest dowodem. Aktualny dowód: wordpress_platform_traps_v1 wymaga wordpress_ekologus i wordpress_sklep; DailyDecision.metric_facts niesie typed source_connector i evidence_id dla każdej faktycznej pary, lecz daily-check dotąd ignorował tę lineage. Live aggregate queue ma oba evidence-backed fakty, a jej upstream evidence list jest skrócona i nie zawierała wcześniej proof sklepu. Poza zakresem: rozszerzanie reguły na indywidualne work ordery publicznej strony, progi low-volume, comparative baseline, source conflict, nowe endpointy/schemy, write path i zmiana zasad kolejki treści. Zależności: wymaga istniejących ExpertRule oraz DailyCheck i blokuje dalsze slop-killing tests.
design: Rozszerz istniejącą granicę API daily-check. Dodaj czysty guard w wilq/briefing/false_positive_guards.py, który porównuje wymagane przez jedną ExpertRule konektory z deklaracją decyzji oraz typed DailyDecision.metric_facts mającymi evidence_id. W wilq/briefing/daily_check.py uruchom go wyłącznie dla aggregate decision_prepare_content_refresh_queue, gdy dokładnie jedna powiązana reguła wymaga co najmniej dwóch konektorów. Brak pary fact/evidence blokuje decyzję po polsku; komplet daje multi_source_ready i dołącza brakujący wymagany evidence ID do DailyCheckItem. Indywidualne publiczne work ordery nie dziedziczą wymagania sklepu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Aggregate daily content queue z deklarowanymi oboma konektorami, ale bez MetricFact/evidence jednego z nich, przechodzi do blocked_recommendation z guardem multi_source_required i polskim safe next step. 2. Pełne typed coverage daje multi_source_ready oraz zachowuje/dołącza evidence IDs obu wymaganych źródeł. 3. Indywidualna publiczna decyzja contentowa nie dziedziczy queue-wide wymagania sklepu. 4. Reguły jednoźródłowe nie otrzymują nowego guardu. 5. Focused testy obejmują pure pass/block, integrację DailyDecision i HTTP daily-check. 6. Live aggregate queue po restarcie ma multi_source_ready i proof obu WordPress connectorów.
close_reason: Zamknięte: aggregate content queue ma evidence-backed multi-source guard z scoped public/store semantics; proof w komentarzu i handoffie.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 completed: aggregate daily content queue now requires both the declared WordPress sources and typed DailyDecision MetricFact evidence for each source before multi_source_ready. Required evidence IDs are retained in DailyCheckItem despite the upstream summary limit. Scoped only to decision_prepare_content_refresh_queue; individual public work orders do not inherit store scope. First declaration-only variant was rejected before commit after independent review; final review found no P0/P1/P2. Proof: focused command-center/daily-check/guard contracts 27/27, Ruff, mypy, diff check; managed restart live item review_required with source_trace_ready, multi_source_ready, date_window_ready, 8 evidence IDs including both WordPress sources; no vendor write. Follow-ups created: v9ab.8.2 measurement baseline and r564.5 weak Ahrefs overlap.

title: Move confirmation-required policy into the review-gate module
description:
## Problem operatora / ryzyko techniczne
`review_gate.py` jest już właścicielem required checks i gate assembly, ale dwa centralne predykaty confirmation-required nadal żyją w service.py. To rozdziela jedną safety policy między fasadę i jej moduł domenowy, zwiększając ryzyko rozjazdu dla prepare/apply/suggest.

## Aktualny dowód
Aktualne service.py zawiera `_requires_human_confirmation` oraz `_action_confirmation_required`; `_action_review_gate` przekazuje je do istniejącego `review_gate.action_review_gate`. Niezależny review potwierdził, że oba są jedyną pozostałą lokalną polityką review-gate w fasadzie.

## Zakres poza zadaniem
Nie zmieniać kolejności validate → preview → human review → confirm → impact → audit → adapter, apply blockers, mutation readiness, endpointów ani ActionObject write policy.

## Proponowany seam/moduł/API
Przenieść oba predykaty do istniejącego wilq/actions/review_gate.py jako mały publiczny interface używany przez jego assembly; service.py ma je importować/delegować bez nowego modułu.
design: Zachować dokładną semantykę: prepare i apply zawsze wymagają confirmation; suggest wymaga confirmation tylko gdy co najmniej jeden check zawiera jednocześnie case-sensitive `human` i `confirm`; pozostałe suggest nie. Testować przez policy matrix oraz istniejący review-gate behavior, nie przez implementacyjne callbacks. Nie normalizować stringów ani nie łagodzić fail-closed gates.
acceptance_criteria: 1. service.py nie definiuje lokalnie confirmation-required policy. 2. review_gate module zwraca identyczne wyniki dla prepare/apply/suggest i checks explicit/non-explicit. 3. Review/apply safety contracts nadal blokują brak confirmation/impact. 4. Focused policy matrix, review/confirmation contracts, Ruff, mypy, complexity i diff check przechodzą. 5. HTTP smoke potwierdza brak vendor write.
close_reason: Acceptance complete: review-gate owns exact confirmation policy, safety contracts and live no-write proof pass, and service no longer duplicates the rule.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 closure proof: review_gate.py now owns requires_human_confirmation and action_confirmation_required; service.py no longer carries local confirmation policy. The same predicate feeds fail-closed action_apply_blockers. Policy matrix covers suggest/prepare/apply plus substring and case-sensitive behavior. Focused review+confirmation contracts 23/23, three ActionObject safety cases, Ruff, mypy, diff check and allowed complexity audit pass. Managed API after restart returns prepare confirmation_required=true with apply_allowed=false; WordPress readiness remains false/false/false, no vendor write. Independent review: no findings, no hidden caller or import-cycle risk.

title: Move Keyword Planner eligibility into its Google Ads action module
description:
## Problem operatora / ryzyko techniczne
Keyword Planner constructor, payload validation i marketer preview są już w wilq/actions/google_ads/keyword_planner.py, ale decyzja czy live Google Ads run kwalifikuje się oraz sanitizacja vendorowego blocked state nadal są w centralnym service.py. To rozprasza jeden kontrakt bezpieczeństwa i utrudnia utrzymanie registry bez ryzyka ujawnienia raw vendor copy.

## Aktualny dowód
Aktualny service.py zawiera _google_ads_keyword_planner_access_action oraz _keyword_planner_access_blocker, wywoływane tylko przez action registry. Istniejący moduł Keyword Planner już jest właścicielem ActionObject, validation i preview. Istniejący API contract potwierdza prepare-only, sanitized blocker, evidence oraz apply_allowed=false.

## Zakres poza zadaniem
Nie zmieniać Google Ads vendor read, developer-token readiness, credentials, endpointów, kolejności ActionObject safety loop, vendor write ani claim policy.

## Proponowany seam/moduł/API
Dodać jedną factory eligibility do istniejącego wilq/actions/google_ads/keyword_planner.py, przyjmującą ConnectorRefreshRun | None i zwracającą ActionObject | None. service.py ma tylko delegować z aktualnym latest run.
design: Factory ma enkapsulować warunki: tylko completed vendor_read z vendor_data_collected=true, tylko rozpoznany Keyword Planner blocked state (developer token/permission/403), stable evidence union i wyłącznie zsanityzowany polski blocker. Interface zwraca wynik zamiast robić I/O; registry pozostaje callerem. Nie tworzyć nowego modułu ani portu, bo istniejący moduł domenowy ma już realną implementację i testową seam.
acceptance_criteria: 1. service.py nie zawiera Keyword Planner eligibility ani raw vendor blocker sanitization. 2. Factory zwraca action tylko dla completed live run z rozpoznaną blokadą, zachowuje evidence order, prepare-only, apply_allowed=false i destructive=false. 3. Nieznany/ready/incomplete run zwraca None. 4. Focused unit i istniejący API contract/preview test przechodzą, a HTTP smoke nadal pokazuje action bez raw vendor copy. 5. Ruff, mypy, complexity, diff check i no-vendor-write proof przechodzą.
close_reason: Acceptance complete: Keyword Planner eligibility and sanitization are domain-owned, behavior contracts and HTTP no-write proof pass, and service delegates without raw vendor copy.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 closure proof: service.py delegates Keyword Planner action eligibility to keyword_planner_access_action_from_vendor_read(). The factory rejects None/status_probe/queued/no-data/ready/unrecognized blocked runs, preserves connector-plus-run evidence order, emits only the sanitized Polish blocker, and keeps prepare/apply_allowed=false/destructive=false. Focused factory + existing API contract 7/7 and preview contract 1/1 pass; Ruff, mypy, diff check and documented allowed complexity audit pass. Managed API after restart reports prepare/false/false, sanitized blocker and no raw vendor markers; WordPress readiness remains false/false/false, no vendor write. Independent review: no findings, no import cycle or safety regression.

title: Unify direct action lookup with live Ads registry eligibility
description:
## Problem operatora / ryzyko techniczne
Gdy live Google Ads read jest dostępny, lista /api/actions prawidłowo usuwa przestarzałą akcję naprawy dostępu act_configure_google_ads_env, ale bezpośredni GET tej samej akcji nadal zwraca 200. Operator może wejść w nieaktualną ścieżkę, a API ma dwie sprzeczne prawdy rejestru.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Uruchom aktualny WILQ API z dostępnym live Google Ads read.
2. Odczytaj GET /api/actions: act_configure_google_ads_env nie występuje (live proof 2026-07-12: 21 akcji).
3. Odczytaj GET /api/actions/act_configure_google_ads_env: odpowiedź ma status 200.

## Aktualny dowód
Kod list_actions() usuwa akcję po live read, ale get_action() buduje inny zestaw bez tej eliminacji.

## Zakres poza zadaniem
Nie zmieniać credentials, Google Ads vendor read, endpointów, ActionObject write flow, polityki apply ani treści aktywnych akcji.

## Proponowany seam/moduł/API
Jedna kanoniczna assembly rejestru akcji w istniejącej granicy action service / Google Ads action registry, używana przez list_actions() i get_action().
design: Zachować API jako źródło prawdy: dynamiczna kwalifikacja Google Ads działa raz w canonical registry assembly. Gdy live read istnieje, legacy OAuth-repair action nie może być zwrócona ani przez listę, ani przez lookup po ID; gdy live read nie istnieje, istniejący OAuth repair flow pozostaje dostępny i review-only. Preferuj istniejącą granicę modułów akcji; nie dodawaj endpointu ani reguły w dashboardzie.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Przy live Google Ads read lista i GET /api/actions/{id} mają zgodny inventory: legacy OAuth repair action jest nieobecna / zwraca 404. 2. Bez live read istniejący OAuth repair action nadal jest dostępny i zachowuje redakcję oraz prepare-only safety. 3. Aktywne Google Ads context/target/strategy/Keyword Planner actions nadal są dostępne wyłącznie przy swoich dotychczasowych warunkach. 4. Focused test kontraktowy obejmuje oba stany i nie ma vendor write. 5. Ruff, mypy, relevant action/API tests, HTTP smoke i diff check przechodzą.
close_reason: Acceptance complete: canonical list/detail registry parity, warm-cache live transition safety, focused behavior tests, HTTP smoke and no-write proof all pass.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 closure proof: canonical _action_registry() is now the only inventory assembly used by list_actions() and get_action(). The Action list cache carries a Google Ads refresh fingerprint, writes only after the pre/post build fingerprint is stable, and stays uncached after two unstable attempts; cache tests cover warm no-live→live and mid-build transition. Focused contracts: ActionObject 48/48, evidence 6/6, cache 4/4; Ruff, mypy, diff check and documented allowed complexity audit pass. Managed API after restart: list omits legacy act_configure_google_ads_env, direct legacy lookup=404, active Keyword Planner lookup=200. WordPress readiness remains false/false/false; no vendor write, endpoint, credential, ActionObject-safety or dashboard change. Independent review found two cache parity gaps; both were fixed and final re-review reported no findings.

title: Trigger dashboard stale refresh from API eligibility policy
description: Potwierdzona luka po wilq-seo-xu5s: API zwraca ConnectorRefreshState.automatic_refresh, ale dashboard nie odczytuje tego pola ani nie uruchamia loopa; stale sources nadal wymagają ręcznego kliknięcia. Live API oznacza jako eligible Google Ads, Merchant i Localo. Zadanie usuwa manualny rytuał bez uruchamiania write capability.
design: W istniejącym /settings SourceAccessCard lub hooku route-level użyć wyłącznie automatic_refresh.eligible z GET /api/connectors. Dla każdego connectora z eligible=true zlecić istniejący POST /api/connectors/{id}/refresh z run_async=true raz na mount/identity; śledzić istniejący GET refresh-run; po terminalnym stanie invalidować connectors oraz affected decision query caches. Nie tworzyć endpointu, nie decydować w React o stale/cooldown, nie odświeżać unknown/missing/partial/failed/blocked, nie robić vendor write i nie pętlić requestów po rerenderze.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Dashboard issues at most one async read-only refresh per connector identity when API policy says eligible. 2. No POST for noneligible reason/cooldown/queued/running. 3. Existing progress/result and cache invalidation remain visible/working; terminal run refreshes affected view-models. 4. Focused Vitest proves one-shot behavior and no automatic write/action; API policy tests, dashboard typecheck/lint/build and browser proof pass. 5. Docs/Bead handoff record live policy state and no vendor write.
close_reason: Acceptance complete: API-owned eligibility, one-shot async read-only trigger, queued-to-terminal proof, terminal scoped invalidation, no automatic retry for noneligible states, focused tests and desktop/mobile proof all pass; no write path was added.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12 closure proof: /settings uses only API refresh_state.automatic_refresh.eligible=true; one async vendor_read per connector identity/mount; POST queued is polled through existing GET refresh-run and connectors plus only API affected_decisions caches invalidate after terminal state. No POST for cooldown/active/noneligible states; status-read failure remains a Polish non-confirmed blocker with retry, never a vendor-failure claim. Focused App+Registry Vitest 38/38, dashboard typecheck/lint/build, diff check and changed-code complexity (0 violations) pass. Desktop/mobile terminal browser proof is .local-lab/proof/continuation-2026-07-12/3gre-settings-terminal-{desktop,mobile}.png. WordPress mutation readiness remains false/false/false; no endpoint, ActionObject, adapter write or vendor write added.

title: Define API-owned stale refresh trigger eligibility
description: Potwierdzona luka operatora: aktualne /api/connectors pokazuje skonfigurowane źródła stale, ale dashboard ma wyłącznie ręczny CTA; aktywny Bead wilq-seo-4wwo jawnie zostawia automatyczny trigger poza zakresem. Marketer nadal musi sam pilnować odświeżenia, a bez polityki triggera nie można bezpiecznie uruchomić loopa. Zakres tego zadania to typed API policy, nie samo automatyczne wywołanie vendorów.
design: Rozszerzyć istniejący ConnectorRefreshState o API-owned eligibility/policy dla read-only stale refresh: tylko configured+read+stale+refresh_allowed, z cooldownem/aktywnym queued-running dedupe i jawnie zablokowanym unknown/missing/blocked/partial. Nie dodawać endpointu; dashboard ma konsumować istniejący GET /api/connectors i istniejący POST refresh. Policy nie może tworzyć ActionObject ani vendor write. Zapisane statusy pozostają redacted.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Każdy connector ma typed auto-refresh eligibility z powodem i safe next step. 2. Stale configured read-only source może być eligible tylko gdy nie ma aktywnego queued/running i nie brakuje credentials. 3. Unknown, missing_credentials, blocked, partial i cooldown są jawnie nieeligible. 4. Existing refresh_state and OpenAPI compatibility tests remain green; focused registry/API tests prove no ActionObject/write capability. 5. Docs and Bead handoff record current live evidence and policy boundary.
close_reason: Typed API-owned trigger eligibility is complete and verified; dashboard loop remains separately scoped under 4wwo.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-12: delivered typed ConnectorRefreshState.automatic_refresh policy: eligible/reason/Polish label/safe next step/900s cooldown. API allows only stale configured read-only sources without credentials or active/recent run; unknown/partial/failed/blocked/missing are fail-closed. Backend 6/6, shared schema 34/34, dashboard focused 31/31, typecheck/lint/build, Ruff/mypy/complexity/diff check pass. Live API marks Ads, Merchant and Localo eligible; no POST refresh/vendor write was sent.

title: Bound cold WordPress mutation-readiness latency after managed restart
description:
Problem operatora / ryzyko techniczne: pierwszy odczyt /api/actions/act_apply_wordpress_draft_handoff/mutation-readiness po managed restart blokuje decyzję o gotowości bezpiecznego szkicu WordPress. Marketer nie widzi przez czas pierwszego requestu, czy apply jest zablokowany, jakie ma dowody i jaki jest następny krok.

Aktualny dowód 2026-07-12: po scripts/local_stack.sh restart health było ok, ale pierwszy mutation-readiness request przekroczył 20 s i zablokował API worker (117% CPU, status ready=no); po rozgrzaniu ten sam HTTP 200 odpowiedział w 18.9 s. Content queue odpowiadała w 2.65 s i jest osobnym cache/prewarm seam. Readiness nadal zwraca ready_to_request_apply=false, vendor_write_possible=false i publication_allowed=false.

Zakres poza zadaniem: nowe endpointy, vendor writes, zmiana ActionObject safety, publikacja, zmiana metryk vendorów, omijanie evidence/freshness, refaktor całego diagnostics.

Kryterium ukończenia: cold readiness po managed restart odpowiada w ustalonym budżecie (preferowane <5 s; jeśli pełny odczyt nie jest gotowy, typed blocked/loading response bez timeoutu), zachowuje evidence IDs, freshness, blocker i safe next step, nie tworzy write capability ani nie zmienia apply=false; focused API/action tests, cold runtime timing, dashboard/browser proof i git diff check przechodzą; handoff dokumentuje przyczynę i SLA.
design: Istniejący seam: mutation_readiness_action -> wordpress_draft_activation_packet -> content diagnostics/cache. Zmierzyć etap blokujący, reuse istniejący diagnostics cache/prewarm albo rozdzielić queue-owned decision shell od ciężkiego activation packet. Nie dodawać nowego endpointu i nie przenosić reguł biznesowych do React. Zachować fail-closed apply, source evidence i current freshness.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cold GET /api/actions/act_apply_wordpress_draft_handoff/mutation-readiness po managed restart mieści się w <5 s albo zwraca jawny typed blocked/loading response bez timeoutu. 2. Odpowiedź zachowuje evidence_ids, source_connectors, freshness, blocker codes i operator_next_step. 3. vendor_write_possible=false, ready_to_request_apply=false i publication_allowed=false pozostają przy braku review/audytu. 4. Brak nowych endpointów i vendor writes. 5. Focused backend/API tests, cold runtime timing, dashboard/browser screenshot i diff check przechodzą. 6. Docs/Bead handoff zapisują SLA i ewentualny external blocker.
notes: Discovered during jnra WordPress adapter execution owner slice; distinct from closed c9h9.6 content-workflow queue cold waterfall and closed zbre Localo action detail. Do not assume the 18.9 s is caused by the adapter extraction; first isolate existing diagnostics warm-up.
close_reason: Closed after quiet-runtime re-audit: >20s latency was caused by orphaned external Chrome request flood, not the WILQ code path. Quiet cold queue 0.003760s and readiness 1.442645s after managed restart; cache/activation hardening has focused regression coverage.

First isolate diagnostics warm-up; no endpoint or vendor write.

Original >20s/30s timeout was contaminated by external browser request flood, not reproducible in quiet runtime. The related product hardening is covered by the 60s diagnostics cache regression and cached activation packet tests; close this Bead as external-state false positive, not a product latency defect.

title: Bound cold Localo action-detail latency after managed restart
description: Problem operatora/ryzyko: pierwszy GET /api/actions/act_review_localo_visibility_facts po managed restart nie odpowiedział w 60 s, więc marketer może nie zobaczyć decyzji, dowodów ani bezpiecznego CTA. Po retry ten sam detail odpowiedział HTTP 200 w 13.241167 s, a ciepły GET /api/actions w 1.496805 s. To dotyczy detailowego read modelu Localo, nie zamkniętego c9h9.11 list/cache seam.
design: Rozdziel koszt cold detail od listowego prewarmu bez nowego endpointu: użyj istniejącego detail view-model/cache/prewarm boundary oraz istniejącego localo metric store/read contract. Zmierz etap seedowania, refresh-run fallback i preview/readiness; nie omijaj evidence/freshness, nie ukrywaj blockerów i nie przenoś I/O do React. Najmniejszy seam ma dać deterministyczny cache/prewarm albo jawny progressive blocked shell, jeśli pełne dane nie są gotowe.
acceptance_criteria: Cold GET /api/actions/act_review_localo_visibility_facts po managed restart kończy się w <5 s albo zwraca jawny typed loading/blocked response bez timeoutu; ciepły detail zachowuje 10 metric rows, evidence IDs, freshness, polskie blokady i apply_allowed=false; brak dodatkowego endpointu i brak vendor write; focused API/action test, runtime timing i browser first viewport przechodzą; dokumentacja i handoff zapisują przyczynę oraz SLA.
notes: Dowód 2026-07-12: pierwsza próba curl -m 60 timeout (bez odpowiedzi), retry po rozgrzaniu HTTP 200 w 13.241167 s; /api/actions po rozgrzaniu 1.496805 s; browser proof localo-metric-fallback-live.*. Zakres poza zadaniem: nowe Localo dane vendor, zmiana ActionObject safety, publikacja/write, listowy c9h9.11. Estimate: 1 bounded day; priority P1. Zależności: wilq-seo-jnra (read-model seam), c9h9.11 jako kontekst zamkniętego list SLA.
close_reason: Cold Localo action-detail SLA fixed through existing registry cache copy with fresh review/audit gate; runtime 0.013299s and focused/browser proof passed.

comments.author: korneliuszburian

Cold Localo detail after full managed restart: HTTP 200 in 0.013299s (previously >60s); 10 metrics, evidence ev_refresh_refresh_localo_30cd98463f06, apply_allowed=false. Focused cache/metric tests 5 passed, Ruff/mypy/complexity/diff-check/browser proof green; no vendor write.

title: Make Merchant diagnostics render its product decision before heavy detail
description:
## Problem
/merchant cold API response exceeds the dashboard E2E budget, so the marketer sees loading instead of the product/feed decision. Updating the stale route heading did not fix the underlying delay.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10 after clean managed restart: focused Playwright waited >30 s for /api/merchant/diagnostics; redacted curl returned status 200 in 33.274604 s. Current route should lead with Produkty and a primary decision, but cannot render before the full diagnostic build.

## Out of Scope
Revenue claims, feed writes, product mutation, new endpoint, full merchant module split and current content P0.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
No active Bead covers Merchant first-render latency. Reuse existing /api/merchant/diagnostics boundary and source freshness state. Required: build/request count, deferred detail Vitest, cold Playwright, Merchant evidence/claim safety tests.

## Done
Primary product decision, freshness and blocker render <=5 s; issue/product/action detail loads locally later and retains evidence.
design: Pogłębić istniejący Merchant diagnostics contract/build seam: cache or stage expensive issue/product joins and expose already-owned summary fields first. React renderuje API view-model; nie dodaje biznesowych fallbacków ani nowego endpointu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cold /api/merchant/diagnostics first decision <=5 s. 2. First viewport has Produkty, freshness, blocker and next step. 3. Heavy issue/product/action details have local loading/disclosure. 4. Evidence IDs/source connectors and no-revenue/write blockers remain. 5. API/Vitest/Playwright/skill smoke pass.
close_reason: Merchant diagnostics now prewarm and reuse a typed cached view through the existing builder/router boundary. Live HTTP first/second reads are under 5s after managed startup; desktop/mobile screenshots show Produkt, freshness, blocker and safe next step before heavy detail. Focused contract/dashboard tests and static checks pass; stale vendor data remains explicitly blocked from current claims.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-11 implementation/proof: added build_merchant_diagnostics_cached with 15s runtime cache and clear seam; existing /api/merchant/diagnostics router now uses it; managed lifespan prewarms Merchant diagnostics and API cache invalidates with existing view-model clear. No endpoint/schema duplication. Live HTTP after restart measured first 0.004860s and second 0.007203s; response remains evidence-backed/stale (10380 products, 1277 reported issue occurrences, 6 decisions, 87h freshness), no unsupported revenue/reapproval/write claims. Browser screenshots: .local-lab/proof/c9h9-13-merchant-first-decision.png and c9h9-13-merchant-mobile-decision.png. Focused Merchant contracts 13/13, dashboard App 22/22, Ruff/mypy/lint/typecheck and diff-check pass.

title: Make the canonical action queue render from a lightweight list view
description:
## Problem
/actions nie renderuje headingu w 30 s. Bezpośredni GET /api/actions odpowiada dopiero po około 23.4 s, zanim React wyrenderuje listę. Centralna kolejka bezpiecznych akcji staje się nieoperacyjna i blokuje E2E.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10 po czystym managed-stack restart: focused Playwright /actions timeout 30.8 s; redacted curl GET /api/actions status=200 total=23.421034 s. Action detail działa osobno, więc problem dotyczy list/registry build.

## Out of Scope
Zmiana ActionObject safety, usuwanie evidence, nowy action endpoint, mechaniczny split service.py i bieżący WordPress P0.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
Powiązane z jnra, ale jnra jest architektonicznym splitem, nie operator latency outcome. Wymagane: API build/request count, list-vs-detail contract, focused Vitest, cold Playwright, mutation safety regression.

## Done
Istniejący GET /api/actions zwraca typed list view w <=5 s, bez uruchamiania ciężkich cross-domain detail builders; detail/preview/audit ładuje się dopiero po wejściu w akcję.
design: Pogłębić istniejący /api/actions list seam: seed/cache action registry raz na request/state revision i serializować wyłącznie list-owned fields. Domain preview cards i mutation detail pozostają w /api/actions/{id}. React nie tworzy fallback decision logic. Bez nowego endpointu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cold GET /api/actions <=5 s. 2. List nie buduje pełnych diagnostics/preview dla każdej domeny wielokrotnie. 3. List zachowuje title/status/risk/evidence summary/safe next step. 4. Detail nadal ma typed preview/audit. 5. Focused API/Vitest/Playwright i action safety tests przechodzą.
close_reason: Closed 2026-07-11: existing /api/actions list seam now has managed prewarm + 15s cache; cold restart HTTP 0.082513s and second 0.021151s; list evidence contract verified; progressive first decision card keeps safe blocked state while readiness loads; operation label overflow fixed; focused Vitest 2/2, backend cache/action tests, dashboard lint/typecheck/build, focused action-detail Playwright 1 passed, live list/detail browser screenshots. Stale legacy /actions E2E remains tracked separately in c9h9.8.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Slice 2026-07-11: istniejący /api/actions list seam ma 15 s cache + managed prewarm; po restarcie HTTP 0.061183 s pierwszy i 0.024930 s drugi odczyt. Dodano progressive NearestSafeActionCard: gdy action list jest gotowa, a mutation readiness jeszcze ładuje się, UI pokazuje tytuł, powód, link do akcji oraz jawnie sprawdzanie readiness i blokadę zapisu; nie udaje podglądu/apply. Dowody: tests/actions/test_action_list_cache.py, focused App action tests 2/2, dashboard lint/typecheck, screenshot .local-lab/proof/c9h9-11-actions-first-decision-loaded.png. Pozostało: świeży cold browser/list-detail proof i acceptance dla list/detail; bezpieczeństwo ActionObject bez zmian.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Dodatkowy browser proof po managed restart: /api/actions 200 w 0.082513 s, drugi odczyt 0.021151 s; screenshot .local-lab/proof/c9h9-11-actions-cold-browser-final.png. Render sprawdzony wizualnie: decyzja, freshness/readiness, blokady, CTA i kolejka są w pierwszym viewport; długi operation label nie nachodzi już na sąsiednią kolumnę po min-w-0/break-words. Testy po poprawce: focused App action 2/2, lint, typecheck, diff-check.

title: Make Ads Doctor summary render without blocking the dashboard E2E queue
description:
## Problem
/ads-doctor nie renderuje API-backed heading w 30 s. Długi request pozostaje aktywny po zamknięciu testu i blokuje następne dashboard E2E na jednoprocesowym local API, przez co jeden ciężki route wygląda jak wiele regresji.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10 managed runtime: focused Playwright ads doctor test przekroczył 30 s przed headingiem. W pełnym non-content runie następny custom-segments test również przekroczył 30 s po Ads. docs/dashboard-state.md już odnotowuje, że route był obserwowany jako stuck on loading i ładuje zbyt dużo przed first paint.

## Out of Scope
Naprawa w bieżącym WordPress safety slice, nowa karta, mechaniczny split ads_diagnostics.py, zmiana metryk lub claim contracts.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
Powiązane z Ads diagnostics/API monolitem, ale nie ma aktywnego zadania na first-render latency. Wymagane: request/build count, focused API summary timing, Playwright cold /ads-doctor, pełny non-content E2E bez kaskadowego timeoutu.

## Done
Istniejący summary contract renderuje decyzję/blokadę w <=5 s na managed stack albo zwraca typed external blocker; ciężkie details ładują się lokalnie później i nie blokują innych tras.
design: Pogłębić istniejący GET /api/ads/diagnostics?view=summary i route query seam. Najpierw renderować API-owned summary/decyzję, a ciężkie campaign/search-term/recommendation details ładować po disclosure. Nie dodawać nowego endpointu, jeśli summary można rozszerzyć/cache'ować.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cold /ads-doctor heading i decyzja <=5 s. 2. Najwyżej jeden summary diagnostics build przed first paint. 3. Details mają lokalny loading/error state. 4. Zamknięcie strony nie blokuje następnego E2E. 5. Focused API/Vitest/Playwright i non-content E2E przechodzą. 6. Evidence/claims/write safety bez regresji.
close_reason: Closed 2026-07-11: existing summary view now uses 15s read-through cache; cold/warm HTTP 1.426757s/0.016956s; shared AdsOperatorSummary schema accepts API payload with safe defaults; Ads route has lazy-boundary and data-loading safe shells, does not block first paint on action queue, and preserves blocked ROAS/revenue/waste/conversion claims. Focused current Playwright ads-summary-current.spec.ts passes 1/1 with measured heading_ms=1853 (<5s), no raw IDs or forbidden Ads Doctor copy; full Ads API contracts, shared schema tests 33, dashboard lint/typecheck/build pass. Legacy dashboard-api.spec.ts Ads strings remain separate c9h9.8.

Następny potwierdzony slice to Ads summary cold render; nie zmieniaj ActionObject safety ani nie dodawaj endpointu. Aktualne runtime ma Ads connector stale/configured; wymagany read-only summary view timing i cold browser proof.

Shared AdsOperatorSummarySchema now defaults three unrelated review fields so API summary parses; permanent shared schema test covers it. AdsDoctorSurface no longer blocks first render on action list; it exposes a safe loading shell and labels pending ActionObject queue without implying write. Evidence: cold/warm HTTP 1.426757s/0.016956s, 5 decisions, all decision evidence present, focused Ads contracts full suite pass, shared schema 33 pass, dashboard build/lint/typecheck, screenshots .local-lab/proof/c9h9-9-ads-contract-shell-3s.png and c9h9-9-ads-contract-full-6s.png.
