title: Lab-test durable runner for planning generations
description: Planning uses a process-local ThreadPoolExecutor while connectors have a durable job registry. Evaluate APScheduler or Codex exec resume as a single runner for planning, with run identity, restart recovery, typed timeout/crash blockers, model-free GET and no duplicate turns. Do not migrate production storage without authority.
design: Compare existing APScheduler registry with codex exec resume; keep current ThreadPoolExecutor until a lab falsifier passes and owner accepts migration.
acceptance_criteria: A bounded lab run proves chosen runner preserves run identity across API restart, recovers or blocks without partial proposal, and does not duplicate a turn; CMS/API egress and sandbox/approval requirements are measured; decision records adopt/reject/defer without production activation.
close_reason: Lab evidence supports an explicit defer: current durable store is safe, but runner migration lacks crash-injection/no-duplicate proof and owner authority; retain current executor until a separately authorized experiment.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Lab checkpoint: existing persistent planning store survives a fresh ContentPlanningProposalStore instance; user-owned store falsifiers pass (3/3): stale queued row can be re-enqueued, concurrent identical enqueue claims once (existing/queued), service scoping remains isolated. APScheduler is configured only for connector jobs and scheduler_status says autostart=false; it cannot recover planning jobs without a new production runner seam. Decision: defer migration, keep current ThreadPoolExecutor + durable queued rows/stale retry until an owner-authorized runner experiment includes process-crash injection and no-duplicate model proof.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-19 final lab disposition: fresh ContentPlanningProposalStore readback preserves queued run identity; existing falsifiers pass 3/3 for stale re-enqueue, identical enqueue claim and service scoping. APScheduler remains connector-only with autostart=false and no planning recovery seam. No process-crash injection/no-duplicate model proof or owner authority exists for a production runner migration. Decision: DEFER adoption; retain current ThreadPoolExecutor + durable queued rows/stale retry, keep migration as a separately authorized experiment. No partial proposal, model approval, vendor write or production activation claimed.

title: Persist marketer section focus across planning regeneration
description: The marketer's selected section is URL+planning-digest bound and disappears after plan regeneration. Persist a server-owned focus keyed by work_item_id with exact section identity and stale semantics so pause/resume returns the operator to the selected section without weakening digest gates.
design: API-owned focus record with work_item_id, section_id, planning_digest, updated_by and audit lineage. Keep content text and unsaved browser edits out of server focus.
acceptance_criteria: Selected section focus survives reload and planning regeneration when section_id still exists; missing/changed section returns typed stale focus and requires reselection; no approval or digest bypass; dashboard restores the focus from API state.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Audyt current seam: dashboard focus is URL query-bound (section_heading + planning_digest), while durable API-owned focus would require a new state table/schema migration. I am not adding a browser-only workaround or unapproved production migration. Keep open for a scoped storage/API slice with backup + maintenance-window authority; current route preserves digest gates.

title: Włączyć jawny auto-reload API w local_stack dla pracy developerskiej
description: Lokalny managed stack nie przeładował modułu po zmianie generatora schema, więc realny retry użył starego kodu. Dodać jawny, bezpieczny tryb developerski auto-reload dla API w scripts/local_stack.sh; produkcyjny/deploy runtime pozostaje bez reload. Opisać stan i sprawdzić, że zmiana pliku API powoduje restart procesu oraz że zwykły status/start nadal działa.
acceptance_criteria: W trybie developerskim local_stack uruchamia API z auto-reload; zmiana modułu API jest widoczna bez ręcznego restartu; produkcyjna ścieżka nie dziedziczy reload; status pokazuje aktywny tryb jednoznacznie.
notes: 2026-07-18: local_stack.sh ma jawny WILQ_API_RELOAD (domyślnie 1), bezpieczny walidator 0/1, --reload tylko dla lokalnego uvicorn oraz status pokazujący reload_mode. Live proof: zmiana wilq/schemas/core.py dała StatReload detected changes i restart procesu serwera; /api/health wrócił 200. Produkcyjny runtime nie używa tego skryptu.
close_reason: Local development API auto-reload is explicit, observable, toggleable, and live-proven; production/deploy runtime remains unchanged.

title: Keep Command Center navigation SPA-native and put the safe next step first
description: Command Center uses raw internal anchors for primary route transitions and the detailed marketer journey places the safe next step below static context. Neither is a data-integrity blocker, but together they add reload latency and delay the decision the cockpit exists to provide.
design: Use TanStack Link for internal route navigation and move the API-owned next-safe-step/CTA into the first decision region without duplicating copy or hiding evidence/blockers. Preserve normal link semantics and keep technical detail below disclosure.
acceptance_criteria: Internal Command Center transitions do not full-reload the SPA; the first decision region states the API-owned next safe step before secondary context on desktop and mobile; blockers and evidence remain visible; focused route and browser proof pass.
close_reason: SPA-native navigation, prominent safe next step, full inventory control label, focused route test and typecheck verified; commits 7872a24b/c6d4de1e pushed.

title: Reduce connector skill scripts after API contract completion
description: Ads, Merchant, Localo and social skills contain many assertion/report/orchestration helpers that mirror typed briefing and API contracts. Research recommendations to keep scripts were not accepted wholesale; uniqueness must be proven.
design: After capability/source contracts stabilize, map each script to a distinct runtime/public risk, delete redundant logic and keep the smallest deterministic smoke plus targeted non-interactive eval. Do not create a replacement framework.
acceptance_criteria: Every retained script has a unique caller and failure mode; duplicate schema/business assertions live in production/tests; dead references are removed; relevant skill smokes/evals still pass; net script files and lines decrease.
notes: Validated script ledger found duplicated brief/connector compaction across 8+ skills, a byte-identical Polish source guard, request_json transport in 5+ scripts, and redundant verify.sh skill structure checks. Keep parity smokes and thin orchestrators. Consolidate/delete only after upstream contracts stabilize; net files/lines must decrease.

title: Decide future Google Ads mutation authority
description: WILQ currently has no Google Ads mutation adapter and every Ads action is prepare-only. This is a product/authority decision, not a missing implementation detail: decide whether native Google Ads UI remains the permanent execution boundary or whether a later bounded ActionObject adapter pilot is worth funding.
design: Do not implement vendor writes in this issue. Compare risk, auditability, rollback, least privilege, supported operations and marketer value. Any future adapter needs a separate explicit authority and must preserve preview-review-confirm-audit.
acceptance_criteria: An owner decision records review-only as the durable boundary or authorizes a separately scoped bounded adapter experiment with exact operations and safety gates. Until then apply_allowed remains false and skills make no execution promise.

title: Consolidate Ads Doctor skill ceremony after reference audit
description: The fixed point contains 21 files in .agents/skills/wilq-ads-doctor/scripts, with tightly coupled assertion/report/orchestration helpers overlapping repository contract tests. The surface is costly to understand and maintain.
design: Map callers and unique protected risks, then delete or merge redundant helpers into the smallest existing entrypoint. Do not replace 21 files with a new framework or preserve test count for its own sake.
acceptance_criteria: Each retained skill script protects a distinct operator/runtime risk; redundant files and dead references are removed; deterministic smoke and one relevant live eval still exercise the public API-owned behavior. Net files and lines decrease.

Replace this stale assertion with ASGI peer-scope coverage that can distinguish remote from loopback without weakening the runtime guard.
acceptance_criteria: Focused middleware/API test proves remote peer 403 and loopback peer allowed; no Host-header authorization claim; security connector file is green.
close_reason: Removed the stale Host-header assertion; existing ASGI peer-scope proof covers remote denial and loopback allowance without changing middleware.

title: Extract Ads business-context read contract assembly
description: Operator/maintenance risk: wilq/briefing/ads_diagnostics.py remains a 6089-LOC monolith. Fresh complexity audit 2026-07-13 shows the business-context contract builder and its dependent state/metric/review-gate helpers still inline, while existing wilq/briefing/ads_campaigns.py already owns Ads business-context section projection and campaign read contracts. This coupling makes future evidence/policy changes harder to review and keeps the active kgvy monolith open. No active Bead covers this exact seam. Scope: extract only the business-context read-contract assembly behind an existing typed owner/callback boundary; preserve all fields and safety semantics. Out of scope: matching rules, ActionObjects, vendor writes, new endpoints, React, budget/recommendation preview helpers and generic mechanical wrappers.
design: Use an existing Ads domain module or a new deep module only if it owns the complete business-context contract assembly and has at least two typed call sites/tests. Keep ads_diagnostics.py as orchestration facade. Inject existing callbacks for env parsing, metric rows, strategy-review state, target interpretation and labels to avoid import cycles. Preserve missing-contract order, blocked CPA/ROAS claims, evidence IDs/source connectors, action IDs, freshness and Polish next steps.
acceptance_criteria: 1. business-context contract assembly no longer owns the monolith branch in ads_diagnostics.py. 2. API response /api/ads/diagnostics is field-for-field and semantic parity for ready/blocked/preliminary/missing-target/approved-review fixtures. 3. Evidence IDs, source connectors, freshness, blocked claims, action IDs and no-write semantics remain unchanged. 4. Focused Ads contract tests cover extracted owner and facade parity; Ruff, mypy, complexity, diff check, API smoke and /ads-doctor or /content-workflow browser proof pass. 5. Complexity records measurable reduction in ads_diagnostics.py and no new frozen-file growth. Estimate: M (2-3 hours). Priority P2.
close_reason: Typed business-context assembly and parity are complete; no remaining confirmed seam.

title: Prewarm daily-check runtime after API readiness
description: Problem operatora: pierwszy GET /api/marketing/daily-check po managed API starcie czeka kilkanaście sekund, zanim WILQ pokaże decyzję. Aktualny live proof 2026-07-13: trzy odczyty HTTP zwróciły 13.038 s, 1.818 s i 2.666 s; warm cache jest szybki, ale cold path przekracza ergonomiczny próg diagnostyki w sekundach. Istniejące API lifespan prewarms content diagnostics, merchant diagnostics, action list i knowledge map, lecz nie daily runtime. Zakres obejmuje wyłącznie background prewarm istniejącego daily runtime cache po readiness oraz bezpieczne czyszczenie/invalidation już istniejącego cache. Poza zakresem: nowe endpointy, zmiana kolejności decyzji, evidence/freshness, vendor refresh/write, React business logic i sztuczne dane.
design: Użyć istniejącego wilq_lifespan/_prewarm_knowledge_map wzorca oraz clear_daily_runtime_cache. Prewarm ma działać po yield przez asyncio.to_thread, nie opóźniać health/readiness i tłumić pojedynczy wyjątek jak pozostałe prewarmy. Nie dodawać osobnego cache ani zmieniać build_daily_runtime; clear_api_view_model_caches musi zachować inwalidację po refreshu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Po managed starcie background prewarm wywołuje build_daily_runtime(use_cache=true) bez blokowania API readiness. 2. Pierwszy GET /api/marketing/daily-check po zakończonym prewarmie mieści się w uzgodnionym budżecie <5 s w 3 kolejnych odczytach albo dowód pokaże konkretną zewnętrzną blokadę. 3. Status, freshness, evidence IDs, source connectors, blockers, safe next steps i ActionObject safety pozostają identyczne przed/po. 4. Test lifespan/prewarm i test cache invalidation po refreshu przechodzą; Ruff, mypy, API smoke, git diff --check i browser proof /content-workflow przechodzą. 5. Bead zawiera before/after timings i pozostałe blokery. Estimate: S, jedna sesja.
close_reason: Background prewarm of existing daily runtime cache meets measured under-5s post-readiness reads without changing API semantics, evidence/freshness or write safety; focused tests, API/browser proof and docs handoff complete.

Ruff, mypy, focused pytest, API smoke, git diff --check and Playwright /content-workflow 1/1 pass.

To utrudnia utrzymanie głównej ścieżki /content-workflow i grozi mieszaniem składania view-modelu z endpoint wiring. Dowód: complexity audit 2026-07-13, wilq/content/workflow/api.py 868 LOC; live queue/snapshot działa, więc zakres ma być behavior-preserving. Poza zakresem: nowe endpointy, zmiana kontraktów evidence/freshness, React, odblokowanie WordPress writes/publish, zmiana claim policy. Proponowany seam: typed stage_snapshot.py z czystymi adapterami snapshotu, kompatybilne wrappery w api.py, istniejące SnapshotAssemblyCallbacks pozostają źródłem reguł. Acceptance: LOC api.py mierzalnie spada, snapshot contract/end-to-end/adversarial tests przechodzą, Ruff, mypy, complexity changed-code bez nowych naruszeń, git diff --check, live workflow snapshot z evidence/source connectors/freshness, browser proof /content-workflow, fail-closed write unchanged. Zależności: fc5b. Testy: tests/api_contracts/test_content_workflow_contracts.py, tests/content/test_content_workflow_end_to_end.py, tests/content/test_content_workflow_adversarial_gates.py oraz live HTTP/browser smoke. Kryterium ukończenia: typed owner ma parity z dotychczasowym outputem i dokument/handoff opisują następny residual seam.
design: Przenieść wyłącznie snapshot stage adapters i ich lokalne helpery; nie kopiować logiki biznesowej do React ani skill references. Zachować publiczne nazwy wrapperów dla router/action imports. Przed implementacją ponownie sprawdzić bd show, complexity i aktualny runtime.
acceptance_criteria: 1. api.py <=800 LOC lub kolejny dokładny bead na pozostały potwierdzony zakres. 2. Snapshot response parity i freshness/evidence unchanged. 3. Focused tests, Ruff, mypy, diff check, live API and browser proof pass. 4. No write/publish unlock.

title: Extract tactical Ahrefs queue assembly before adopting the compiled matcher
description:
## Problem operatora lub ryzyko

Tactical queue nadal buduje cross-check Ahrefs od nowa dla każdej grupy luk. Ten sam compiled matcher, który naprawił `/api/ahrefs/diagnostics`, nie może zostać bezpiecznie podłączony w aktualnym `wilq/briefing/tactical_queue.py`: bieżący complexity audit wskazuje 1400 LOC przy budżecie 800 i `_merchant_feed_items` 115 LOC przy budżecie 100. Dodanie jednej optymalizacji do monolitu byłoby nieudokumentowanym naruszeniem bramki.

## Aktualny dowód

2026-07-13: podczas c9h9.17 próbne użycie compiled matcher w `_ahrefs_gap_items` spowodowało changed-code violation `tactical_queue.py` 1400 > 800 oraz istniejącą funkcję `_merchant_feed_items` 115 > 100. Ahrefs planner ma już immutable matcher, ale tactical queue nadal wywołuje raw `assess_ahrefs_cross_source_overlap` w pętli po grupach. Nie znaleziono aktywnego Beada o tym dokładnym seamu.

## Poza zakresem

Zmiana matching rules exact/weak/missing, nowe endpointy, cache odpowiedzi, ActionObjecty, vendor writes, publikacja, rewizja całej kolejki lub mechaniczne przenoszenie niezwiązanych domen.

## Zależności i wymagane testy

Parent `wilq-seo-c9h9`; discovered-from `wilq-seo-c9h9.17`. Zachować `tests/test_tactical_queue.py`, `tests/content/test_ahrefs_cross_source_overlap.py` i contracts Ahrefs. Dodać test, że batch Ahrefs tactical queue kompiluje matcher raz i zachowuje weak/manual/no-action.

## Kryterium ukończenia

Tactical Ahrefs branch ma własny typed module/seam, caller jest cienkim adapterem, compiled matcher jest tworzony raz na batch, semantics/evidence/action IDs są niezmienione, diff wyłącznie redukuje odpowiedzialność monolitu i bramka complexity jest zielona albo używa wyłącznie jawnego tymczasowego wyjątku extraction z mierzalnym spadkiem LOC i kolejnym dokładnym Beadem dla pozostałego redukcji.
design: Wydzielić tylko `_ahrefs_gap_items` i jego Ahrefs-specific grouping, labels oraz diagnosis helpers do typed `wilq/briefing/tactical_ahrefs.py`. Moduł przyjmuje fakty Ahrefs, action IDs i cross-check facts, zwraca `list[TacticalQueueItem]`, kompiluje `AhrefsCrossSourceMatcher` raz i nie zmienia reguł źródeł. `tactical_queue.py` zostaje adapterem do nowego modułu. Nie przenosić Merchant ani WordPress helpers bez osobnego dowodu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Ahrefs tactical queue używa compiled matcher raz na batch, bez ponownego tworzenia GSC/WordPress records dla każdej grupy. 2. Exact/weak/missing, public/dev WordPress semantics, evidence IDs, source connectors i zero ActionObjectów dla manual/weak pozostają zgodne z obecnymi contracts. 3. `tactical_queue.py` oddaje Ahrefs branch do typed modułu i diff redukuje jego odpowiedzialność; nie dodaje nowej logiki biznesowej do monolitu. 4. Focused tactical/Ahrefs tests, Ruff, mypy, `git diff --check` oraz complexity report przechodzą; jeśli potrzebny jest extraction-only allow-budget, Bead dokumentuje zmniejszenie LOC i tworzy konkretny follow-up dla pozostałego budżetu. 5. Live tactical queue HTTP zachowuje semantykę Ahrefs i nie wprowadza write path.
close_reason: Ahrefs tactical seam complete; remaining monolith budget is tracked in wilq-seo-ipps.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-13 implementation proof: extracted Ahrefs assembly to wilq/briefing/tactical_ahrefs.py; matcher compiles once per batch. 8 focused tests, Ruff, mypy and live /api/marketing/tactical-queue pass (24 items, 19 groups, 3 action IDs). Complexity normal audit still exposes tactical_queue.py 1311 LOC and _merchant_feed_items 115 LOC; extraction-only allow-budget was used transparently with measured 90+ LOC reduction. Follow-up wilq-seo-ipps owns remaining Merchant branch extraction.

title: Reduce Ahrefs diagnostics latency without weakening evidence freshness
description:
## Problem operatora lub ryzyko

Ahrefs jest inputem do decyzji contentowej, ale operator czeka kilkanaście sekund na diagnostics. To opóźnia pierwszy dowód i zachęca do odczytu kart lub promptu zanim WILQ pokaże manualny blocker.

## Aktualny dowód

Po managed restart i bez aktywnego pełnego skanu detect-secrets, GET /api/ahrefs/diagnostics zwrócił 200 w 14.654183 s, a kolejny warm read 200 w 15.872616 s. Health i metrics są zdrowe. Live odpowiedź ma manual_required cross-check, 6 kandydatów, 0 exact GSC i WordPress matches oraz 0 actions. Nie ma aktywnego Beada dla latency Ahrefs.

## Poza zakresem

Nowy endpoint, zmiana Ahrefs/GSC/WordPress matching, obniżenie evidence requirements, ukrywanie stanu loading, stale statyczne dane, vendor refresh/write i React business logic.

## Zależności

Parent wilq-seo-c9h9; istniejący build_ahrefs_diagnostics, connector refresh runs, content cross-check facts i dashboard Ahrefs surface. Niezależne od 3bst.7, które poprawia pierwszą decyzję UI.
design:
## Zrealizowany seam

`AhrefsCrossSourceMatcher` w `wilq/content/planning/ahrefs_overlap.py` kompiluje immutable rekordy GSC i publicznego WordPressa raz na batch. Planner przekazuje matcher do wszystkich scoring calls; raw `assess_ahrefs_cross_source_overlap()` pozostaje adapterem dla pojedynczych wywołań. To zachowuje exact/weak/missing, order/source/evidence lineage i dev URL rejection bez cache response.

## Odrzucone podejście

Nie dodawaj cache/prewarm do response przed usunięciem CPU root cause. Cache maskowałby repeat reads, ale cold/post-refresh build nadal blokowałby operatora i wymagał ryzykownej invalidacji freshness. Pozostały tactical queue monolith ma osobny task `c9h9.18`.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Runtime cause jest zmierzony przez HTTP lub bezpieczny profiler; nie przypisuj kosztu bez dowodu.
2. Pierwsza decyzja Ahrefs w aktualnym local stack pojawia się w budżecie poniżej 5 s po warm/prewarm lub cache policy ma udokumentowany, mierzalny powód oraz bezpieczny fallback.
3. API zachowuje cross_check_status, evidence IDs, source connectors, freshness, manual blocker, zero action semantics i brak write path.
4. Cache lub optimization invaliduje się przy relevant Ahrefs refreshu oraz zmianie inputów GSC/WordPress cross-check; nie serwuje fałszywie świeżych danych.
5. Focused backend/cache contracts, Ruff, mypy, diff check i live HTTP timing przechodzą; browser proof pokazuje decyzję przed szczegółami.
6. Bead zapisuje measured before/after i każdą pozostałą zewnętrzną blokadę.
notes: 2026-07-13 completed: red-capable HTTP loop before fix reached 17.760386 s (other live reads 14.654183–25.637534 s). Isolated profile found 338 repeated GSC/WordPress record builds for 338 gaps (93m calls, 46.961183 s CPU). After compiled matcher, three managed-stack HTTP reads were 1.354044 s, 1.351506 s, 1.212189 s; live contract remains manual_required, 6 candidates, zero exact GSC/WordPress matches and zero actions. No cache, new endpoint, write path or matching semantics. Focused tests 16 passed; Ruff/mypy/complexity/fallow/diff/browser proof pass. Tactical extraction is c9h9.18.
close_reason: Compiled source matcher removes the measured CPU root cause; live endpoint meets the under-5-second budget while preserving evidence-first manual cross-check semantics.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-13: closed with root-cause fix, not a cache. The compiled immutable matcher turns repeated source-record construction for 338 gaps into one batch compile. Red HTTP loop 17.760386 s; after managed restart 1.354044/1.351506/1.212189 s. Live manual_required/6 candidates/0 exact/0 actions is unchanged. Proof: docs/handoffs/2026-07-13-c9h9-17-ahrefs-latency-handoff.md. Tactical queue adoption is separately tracked by c9h9.18.

title: Extract typed work-item snapshot assembly from the content workflow API monolith
description:
## Problem operatora lub ryzyko

Content workflow API ma 1500 LOC przy lokalnym budżecie 800. Łączy routing, queue, preflight, brief, draft, review, handoff i snapshot assembly, przez co zmiana decyzji marketera wymaga edycji monolitu i utrudnia sprawdzenie, czy pola evidence, freshness, Service Profile oraz write gates pozostają spójne.

## Aktualny dowód

Audit complexity z 2026-07-12 po zmianie r564.6 wskazuje wilq/content/workflow/api.py jako jedyne changed-code budget violation: 1500 LOC ponad budżet 800. Nowy typed Service Profile projector jest już osobnym modułem, ale snapshot work itemu nadal składa API module w builders przy około linii 1200. Search Beads nie znalazł aktywnego taska dokładnie dla tego seamu.

## Poza zakresem

Nowy endpoint, zmiana reguł kolejki lub claimów, React business logic, Workspace Dossier, vendor write, publish, ActionObject policy oraz mechaniczne dzielenie całego modułu bez behavior boundary.

## Zależności

Parent wilq-seo-c9h9; istniejące typed snapshot contracts, work_item_service_profile projector i content workflow contract tests.
design:
## Proponowany seam lub moduł

Wydziel jeden mały typed snapshot assembly module pod wilq/content/workflow, który przejmie budowanie workflow snapshotu oraz jego lokalne helpers dla preflight, Sales Brief, draft package, human review, handoff i measurement. Publiczne API functions i existing routes pozostają adapterem; matcher kart wiedzy ma być obliczany raz i przekazywany do wszystkich downstream projections. Nie przenoś routing ani write actions do nowego modułu.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Jeden self-contained snapshot assembly module ma wyraźne typed input/output i bez cyklu importów.
2. Existing snapshot HTTP response zachowuje response type, evidence IDs, source connectors, freshness, Service Profile context, public/dev semantics oraz publish/write false.
3. Existing route/API layer jest cieńszym adapterem i nie zawiera ponownie wydzielonego snapshot business logic.
4. Focused snapshot, preflight, brief, draft, human review i handoff tests przechodzą; Ruff, mypy, diff check i complexity report dokumentują zmniejszony seam bez nowego growth violation.
5. Live HTTP snapshot po managed restart pokazuje aktualny evidence-first decision bez secretów, a browser proof content workflow nie regresses.
6. Completion closes tylko ten seam; dalszy monolith scope dostaje osobny evidence-backed Bead.
close_reason: Typed snapshot orchestration seam complete; remaining stage adapter extraction tracked in wilq-seo-zdm2.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-13 implementation proof: snapshot orchestration moved to wilq/content/workflow/snapshot_assembly.py with typed SnapshotAssemblyCallbacks and response output. 12 focused content tests, Ruff, mypy, diff check, live workflow_snapshot proof and browser /content-workflow first viewport pass. Live candidate remains fresh with 2 evidence IDs (GSC + WordPress); Service Profile/handoff/measurement blockers remain explicit. Complexity api.py reduced to 1470 LOC; residual stage-adapter work tracked in wilq-seo-zdm2.

title: Unblock security scan from intentional redaction fixture keyword
description: Problem operatora lub ryzyko: pełny scripts/security.sh kończy się błędem, więc jego wynik nie odróżnia nowego sekretu od znanego fixture. Aktualny dowód: 2026-07-12 detect-secrets wskazuje wyłącznie tests/actions/test_audit_store_contracts.py:112, gdzie mapping_secret jest celowym nazwaniem pola sprawdzającym redakcję, nie credentialem. Skan wszystkich 26 plików r564.5 zwraca results={} . Poza zakresem: wyłączanie detect-secrets, globalne obniżanie reguł, zmiana produkcyjnej redakcji lub ignorowanie realnych sekretów. Zależność: odkryte w trakcie weryfikacji r564.5; parent c9h9.
design: Zachowaj test semantyki redakcji pola secret i pełny skan. Zastosuj najwęższą jawną allowlistę fixture lub równoważne nie-sekretne oznaczenie, które nie maskuje innych plików ani wartości. Utrzymaj detect-secrets jako bramkę dla faktycznych zmian.
acceptance_criteria: 1. scripts/security.sh przechodzi detect-secrets bez ignorowania globalnych wyników. 2. Fixture nadal testuje ukrywanie pola o semantyce sekretu. 3. Nowy scoped test lub proof pokazuje, że allowlista nie obejmuje innych linii/plików. 4. Ruff/targeted pytest i git diff --check przechodzą. 5. Bead zawiera aktualny output bramki.
notes: 2026-07-13 completed: one inline `# pragma: allowlist secret` scopes the intentional audit-redaction fixture to its one physical line. New deterministic scoped test proves the fixture scan is empty, --only-allowlisted yields exactly one Secret Keyword, and the same unallowlisted runtime field in another file is still detected. Full scripts/security.sh now exits 0 with detect-secrets results={} and no known pip-audit vulnerabilities; semgrep remains explicitly unavailable. Focused pytest 14, Ruff, mypy, complexity and diff check pass.
close_reason: Full detect-secrets gate is restored with a one-line fixture allowlist and a regression test proving equivalent unallowlisted fields remain detectable.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: 2026-07-13: closed. The allowlist is inline and one-line-only for the intentional mapping_secret redaction fixture. Scoped detector test proves same unallowlisted field is still caught elsewhere; full scripts/security.sh passes detect-secrets with no findings. No global exclude, detector disablement or production redaction change. Handoff: docs/handoffs/2026-07-13-c9h9-15-security-allowlist-handoff.md.

title: Remove concurrent cold-build contention from the Knowledge surface
description:
## Problem
/knowledge uruchamia operating-map, cards i playbooks równolegle. Na zimnym managed runtime współbieżny odczyt powoduje 51.6 s dla operating-map i E2E timeout, mimo że każdy endpoint po rozgrzaniu odpowiada poniżej sekundy.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10: focused knowledge-layout Playwright timeout 30.2 s czekając na /api/knowledge/operating-map. Po restarcie pojedynczy cold operating-map 16.52 s; przy równoległych cold cards/playbooks: cards 1.90 s, playbooks 1.69 s, operating-map 51.57 s. Payloady nie były drukowane.

## Out of Scope
Zmiana knowledge semantics/approval, nowy endpoint, publikacja wiedzy i refaktor całego GenericSurface.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
No active task covers cold contention. Reuse existing knowledge endpoints/builders. Required: request/build count, concurrent cold timing, deferred UI test, Playwright knowledge layout, knowledge lifecycle regression.

## Done
Pierwsza knowledge decision renderuje <=5 s; cards/playbooks nie konkurują z primary operating map i ładują się dopiero przy potrzebie albo ze współdzielonego cache/snapshotu.
design: Pogłębić wspólny knowledge snapshot/compiler cache seam albo sekwencjonować subordinate queries po primary map. GenericSurface najpierw renderuje map-owned decyzję, a cards/playbooks mają lokalne loading/disclosure. Nie dodawać duplikującego endpointu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Jedno cold primary knowledge build <=5 s. 2. Concurrent subordinate reads nie wydłużają operating-map >5 s. 3. First decision renderuje przed katalogiem. 4. Cards/playbooks zachowują lineage/status po lokalnym load. 5. API/Vitest/Playwright i lifecycle tests przechodzą.
close_reason: Acceptance met: primary map build is under 5s at core, non-blocking prewarm removes API/process cold overhead without delaying startup health, subordinate catalogs are deferred, lineage remains covered, and API/Vitest/Playwright/lifecycle proof passes.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Slice 2026-07-11 started: GenericSurface now loads only operating-map initially; knowledge cards/playbooks queries are disabled until their disclosure buttons are opened, removing concurrent subordinate builds from the first decision. Existing operating-map endpoint now has 15s read-through cache; cache unit test passes. Cold HTTP after managed restart remains 18.940732s, warm 0.053012s, so no prewarm is kept in lifespan because the 18s build would block startup health; the route still renders the marketer-facing knowledge decision/blockers within the first 3s while map data is loading. Proof: .local-lab/proof/c9h9-12-knowledge-progressive-3s.png. Focused GenericSurface 4/4, dashboard lint/typecheck and Ruff/mypy pass. Remaining: reduce cold operating-map build below 5s or introduce a non-blocking safe prewarm without startup regression; do not claim map is fresh before it loads.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Follow-up measurement: standalone list_workflows() triggers build_daily_runtime and measured 8.519s in a fresh process; the subsequent build_daily_command_center() was 0.0s only because daily runtime caches were already warm. No safe semantic reduction was committed from this probe; map cold HTTP remains 18.940732s. Next implementation must target the actual operating-map build/cache or a non-blocking warm-up, not duplicate command-center endpoints.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Reduction proof 2026-07-11: wilq/workflows/registry.py now uses existing build_daily_command_center() because Knowledge map only consumes daily_decisions; it no longer builds the full marketing brief. Fresh standalone build_knowledge_operating_map() measured 4.878s with 11 bindings, 15 source cards and 14 playbooks. Managed HTTP after restart remains ~8.53s without prewarm due API/process overhead, warm cache ~0.05s; re-enabling lifespan prewarm still exceeds local-stack startup readiness, so it stays disabled. New focused knowledge-current Playwright passes 1/1 in 2.9s; GenericSurface 4/4, knowledge contract tests, Ruff/mypy pass. Remaining: decide whether API-process overhead needs a separately measured non-blocking warm-up; do not block startup or restore concurrent catalogs.

comments.author: korneliuszburian
comments.text: Slice 2026-07-11 completion: map cache access is guarded by a threading lock; GenericSurface only reads operating-map initially and defers cards/playbooks until disclosure. Managed lifespan now starts a fail-open asyncio.to_thread prewarm after synchronous readiness work, so startup health is not blocked. After managed restart API health was ready and operating-map HTTP reads measured 0.003550 s then 0.003175 s from the warmed cache; standalone map core remains 4.878 s with 11 bindings, 15 cards and 14 playbooks. Concurrent subordinate cold reads are removed from the first path, so they cannot extend the primary map build. API knowledge contract/cache tests, Ruff, mypy, dashboard focused tests and current Playwright all pass: 1/1 knowledge-current in 2.7 s (29.2 s including harness startup). Queue remains a separate external content blocker; no freshness claim added. Docs updated in PROGRESS, current-cleanup-state and dashboard-state.

title: Load Custom Segments from a narrow Ads diagnostics view
description:
## Problem
/ads-doctor/custom-segments calls the full Ads diagnostics contract and does not render its heading within the 30 s Playwright budget, even after a clean managed-stack restart. Experimental route blocks its own E2E and contributes to dashboard queue latency.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10 focused Playwright custom-segments test failed after 30.8 s waiting for Segmenty z haseł. CustomSegmentsDiagnosticSurface.tsx uses getAdsDiagnostics(), while AdsDoctorSurface already uses getAdsDiagnosticsSummary().

## Out of Scope
Campaign writes, audience creation/apply, invented audience sizes, refactor entire ads_diagnostics.py and priority work on /content-workflow.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
No active Bead covers this route latency. Reuse/extend existing /api/ads/diagnostics view boundary. Required: focused API view contract, Vitest, cold Playwright, no unsupported audience/ROAS claims.

## Done
Custom segments heading/decision renders <=5 s or exposes typed source blocker, while detailed candidate/forecast data remains evidence-backed and review-only.
design: Rozszerzyć istniejący Ads diagnostics view seam o minimalny custom-segments projection albo udowodnić, że summary może zachować wymagane typed fields. Dashboard nie może ładować pełnych kampanii/search terms/recommendations dla samej decyzji segmentowej. Bez nowego endpointu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Route nie używa bezwarunkowo pełnego getAdsDiagnostics. 2. Narrow view zawiera status, source terms/candidates, missing contracts, forecast blocker, evidence IDs/connectors. 3. Cold first decision <=5 s. 4. Focused API/Vitest/Playwright przechodzą. 5. Audience size, ROAS i write pozostają zablokowane bez kontraktu.
close_reason: Closed 2026-07-11: CustomSegmentsDiagnosticSurface now consumes existing /api/ads/diagnostics?view=summary, which preserves typed custom-segment candidates, forecast, keyword-planner status, evidence and blocked claims without full Ads payload. Focused Playwright dashboard-api.spec.ts custom segments route passes 1/1 in 4.4s; dashboard lint/typecheck, Ads contracts and summary cache proof pass. No new endpoint, audience-size/ROAS claims or write path added.

comments.text: Handoff: legacy full Ads diagnostics remains used only by /ads-doctor full detail; summary seam is the canonical narrow route input. Any future enrichment must extend summary view or a typed existing view, not revert to getAdsDiagnostics().

title: Stabilize Service Profile route test under the full dashboard suite
description:
## Problem
Pełny dashboard Vitest run nie jest deterministyczny: ServiceProfileSurface.test.tsx przechodzi izolowanie, ale w 24-file parallel run pierwszy findByText kończy się przed załadowaniem trasy. To blokuje canonical scripts/verify.sh i może ukryć realne regresje za losowym retry.

## Current Evidence
2026-07-10: isolated file 1/1 passed; dwa pełne runy zakończyły się odpowiednio globalnym 5000 ms timeoutem oraz TestingLibraryElementError po domyślnym około 1000 ms async query. Pozostałe 136 dashboard tests passed. Zmieniany WordPress/content zakres nie importuje ServiceProfileSurface.

## Out of Scope
Zmiana Service Profile UI/API, osłabianie asercji, globalne zwiększenie timeoutów, serializacja całego Vitest i refaktor routera.

## Dependencies and Required Tests
Discovered from c9h9.3 final verification. Focused ServiceProfile test, full 24-file dashboard Vitest, lint/typecheck and final remaining verify stages must pass.

## Done
Test czeka jawnie i lokalnie na async route render w realistycznym budżecie, nadal wykonuje wszystkie istniejące product assertions, przechodzi izolowanie oraz w pełnym równoległym dashboard runie.
design: Seam: tylko async readiness pierwszego renderu w ServiceProfileSurface.test.tsx. Użyć lokalnego Testing Library timeout/test budget bez zmiany produkcji, bez retry i bez usuwania asercji; zachować pełne zachowanie testu.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Pierwsza asercja route readiness ma jawny timeout adekwatny do pełnego parallel runu. 2. Żadna istniejąca asercja produktu nie jest usunięta ani poluzowana. 3. Izolowany test przechodzi. 4. Pełny dashboard Vitest ma 137/137. 5. Lint, typecheck i git diff --check przechodzą.
notes: 2026-07-10 completed: ServiceProfileSurface kept every product assertion and received only a local 10s async route-readiness wait plus 15s test budget. Isolated file passes 1/1; full parallel dashboard run passes 24 files and 137/137 tests; ESLint/typecheck pass. No production code or global timeout changed.
close_reason: Local async test budget stabilizes Service Profile without weakening assertions; isolated and full 137/137 dashboard tests pass.

title: Create mobile triage mode for daily cockpit
description: Second opinion says mobile is responsive but not operational. Mobile should show one most important work item, two blockers, one CTA and queue as a list.

close_reason: Mobile triage first viewport proven with one work item, two blockers and one safe CTA; API and desktop behavior unchanged.

acceptance_criteria: Daily-check safe next actions can be logged as recommendation records and later connected to measurement/learning without performing vendor mutation.
close_reason: Redacted recommendation ledger is reportable through daily-check and remains separate from vendor writes/ActionObject apply.

title: Goal 003 anti-slop changed-code budgets

close_reason: Completed changed-code anti-slop budgets in audit_complexity.py with focused tests and passing changed audit.

title: Goal 002 extract Codex context-pack runtime internals
description: Move heavy Codex context-pack construction helpers out of apps/api/wilq_api/main.py into a focused runtime/service module without changing /api/codex/context or /api/codex/context-pack response shapes.
design: This is behavior-preserving extraction after router extraction. Keep routers thin. Do not add content product behavior, prompt logic or dashboard labels. The service may depend on domain builders and stores, but no domain module may import apps.api.
acceptance_criteria: Focused Codex context-pack API tests and route smoke pass before and after extraction. main.py no longer owns context-pack helper internals beyond app wiring. Context-pack output remains API-owned, evidence-gated and redacted.
notes: Partial slice 2026-06-30: skill-scoped context-pack orchestration, skill diagnostics dispatch and skill opportunity filtering moved from apps/api/wilq_api/main.py to apps/api/wilq_api/context_skill.py. main.py now delegates non-daily skill context packs to that runtime module and no longer keeps per-skill routing/evidence/redaction flow locally. Focused checks passed: Ruff on main.py/context_skill.py, mypy on the same files, focused pytest for content, GSC, Ads, custom-segment, campaign-builder, Demand Gen, social, knowledge and expert skill context packs, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check. Issue remains open until full-context assembly is either extracted or explicitly deemed app wiring.
close_reason: Completed behavior-preserving context-pack runtime extraction: main.py delegates daily, skill-scoped and full-context context-pack construction to focused runtime modules; full-context assembly moved to apps/api/wilq_api/context_full.py; focused full-context tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

close_reason: Recovery docs are aligned with the current Beads graph: closed label cleanup is no longer listed as active work, docs point to bd ready for the queue, and Goal 001 completion check still records UAT/defer as the blocker.
